the taming.name: The Taming
mods: 21% increased Damage for each type of Elemental Ailment on Enemy
Wind Skills which can be boosted by Elemental Ground Surfaces can be boosted by multiple Elemental Ground Surfaces
Wind Skills which can be boosted by Elemental Ground Surfaces count as being boosted by Ignited, Shocked, and Chilled Ground
the taming.flavour: "Moon after moon did Berek make fools Of the great and Untamed Three Until malice for a Brother Slew the hatred of the Other And Berek did hunt Alone and free." - Berek and the Untamed

guiding palm of the heart.name: Guiding Palm of the Heart
mods: Gain 25% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Allies in your Presence deal 18 to 31 added Attack Fire Damage
50% of your Base Life Regeneration is granted to Allies in your Presence
Grants effect of Guided Meteoric Shrine
guiding palm of the heart.flavour: "Power of the Red Pyre! Flaming Heart of the Hive! I release your burning message to rest here, forevermore." The Dreamer declared, casting out the lingering dark embers within him.

the black insignia.name: The Black Insignia
mods: Gain Tailwind on Critical Hit, no more than once per second
the black insignia.flavour: Brinerot pirates live in a perpetual blaze of glory, pushing their luck right to the end.

mageblood.name: Mageblood
mods: All Mage's Legacies have 35% increased effect per duplicate Mage's Legacy you have
mageblood.flavour: Rivers of power coursed through their veins. Now, that power is yours, for good or ill.

skysliver.name: Skysliver
mods: Rolls only the minimum or maximum Damage value for each Damage Type
skysliver.flavour: Heads fall to the sand, just as the star fell from the sky

the ordained.name: The Ordained
mods: 25% increased Melee Strike Range with this weapon
Life Leech recovers based on your Lightning damage as well as Physical damage
Create a Fragment of Divinity in your Presence every 4 seconds
the ordained.flavour: May the Lightless drown in the violence of His devotion.

rite of passage.name: Rite of Passage
mods: Used when you kill a Rare or Unique enemy
Possessed by Spirit Of The Cat for 17 seconds on use
rite of passage.flavour: To become a warrior and a hunter, each young Azmeri must prove themselves before the Spirit.

sacred flame.name: Sacred Flame
mods: Gain 50% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Allies in your Presence Regenerate 2.4% of their Maximum Life per second
Allies in your Presence Gain 28% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Enemies in your Presence Resist Elemental Damage based on their Lowest Resistance
sacred flame.flavour: Fire destroys, but fire also purifies. Life always springs anew.

lavianga s spirits.name: Lavianga's Spirits
mods: This Flask cannot be Used but applies its Effect constantly
lavianga s spirits.flavour: "How do I cope with what I witnessed on Wraeclast? Thank the Ancestors! My cup, it overflows." - Lavianga, former advisor to Kaom

palm of the dreamer.name: Palm of the Dreamer
mods: Allies in your Presence deal 17 to 35 added Attack Chaos Damage
Gain 27% of Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
Grants effect of Dreaming Gloom Shrine
palm of the dreamer.flavour: "We sometimes fail. We sometimes succeed. Who determines one from the other? I now know we can never be made One, if we are bore of differing desires. And yet, I have hope for a new truth. And I will see it... made real." - The Benevolent Dreamer

nascent hope.name: Nascent Hope
mods: 25% Chance to gain a Charge when you kill an enemy
Energy Shield Recharge starts on use
nascent hope.flavour: "Even in the face of the Winter of the World, life found a way. The Spirit always provides."

cadiro s gambit.name: Cadiro's Gambit
mods: Each Arrow fired is a Crescendo, Splinter, Reversing, Diamond, Covetous, or Blunt Arrow
cadiro s gambit.flavour: "One can never fully eliminate Chance, but with the right machinations, all the outcomes may be turned in your favour..." - Cadiro Perandus

hyrri s ire.name: Hyrri's Ire
mods: Gain 19% of Damage as Extra Cold Damage
Evasion Rating is doubled if you have not been Hit Recently
hyrri s ire.flavour: Hyrri loosed a barrage of arrows, tipped with a poisoned hatred only oppression can ferment.

headhunter.name: Headhunter
mods: When you kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
headhunter.flavour: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat. The head is where the Man is." - Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

beira s anguish.name: Beira's Anguish
mods: 25% Chance to gain a Charge when you kill an enemy
Creates Ignited Ground for 4 seconds when used, Igniting enemies as though dealing Fire damage equal to 500% of your maximum Life
beira s anguish.flavour: They found a crying child tied to a frozen pyre. She was clad in ice, but the village was ash.

controlled metamorphosis.name: Controlled Metamorphosis
mods: Only affects Passives in Medium-Large Ring
Passives in Radius can be Allocated without being connected to your tree
controlled metamorphosis.flavour: Our world was dying, but we chose to survive. We broke free from the chains within.

kalandra s touch.name: Kalandra's Touch
kalandra s touch.flavour: Power is a matter of perspective.

from nothing.name: From Nothing
mods: Passives in Radius of Vaal Pact can be Allocated without being connected to your tree
from nothing.flavour: They clawed their way up from the agonising depths of nonexistence, breathing deep with joy the exquisite light of meaning.

voices.name: Voices
voices.flavour: Only a madman would ignore a god's instructions.

lochtonial caress.name: Lochtonial Caress
mods: Has +3 to Evasion Rating per player level
Has +1 to maximum Energy Shield per player level
Has +1 to Evasion Rating per player level
Has +1 to maximum Energy Shield per player level
8% less damage taken while on Low Life
7% chance to grant a Endurance Charge to Allies in your Presence on Hit
6% chance to grant a Frenzy Charge to Allies in your Presence on Hit
10% chance to grant a Power Charge to Allies in your Presence on Hit

amor mandragora.name: Amor Mandragora
mods: Enemies in your Presence are Hindered
Gain 1 Druidic Prowess for every 20 total Rage spent
amor mandragora.flavour: A sensitive few among the first settlers of Ezomyr followed the wisps by canoe. On a misty forested island, Cirel of Tarth stood waiting to greet them.

split personality.name: Split Personality
mods: Can Allocate Passive Skills from the Ranger's starting point
split personality.flavour: "Try on another life. See how it fits. You'll find that your one life is utterly inadequate." - He of Many Names and Many Faces

flesh crucible.name: Flesh Crucible
flesh crucible.flavour: "Never mind the pain, it's only... making room. Unrelated fact, a person can live a normal life with just one kidney. Or just one lung. You never know what Vaal technology will cost you..."

sanguis heroum.name: Sanguis Heroum
sanguis heroum.flavour: Wraeclast has known too few true heroes. It remembers those that stood in defiance.

the fall of the axe.name: The Fall of the Axe
mods: Used when you are affected by a Slow
the fall of the axe.flavour: "When the headsman's blade swings, your last moments stretch to eternity." - Vorm, the Twice-Pardoned

melting maelstrom.name: Melting Maelstrom
mods: Effect is not removed when Unreserved Mana is Filled
Every 3 seconds during Effect, deal 100% of Mana spent in those seconds as Chaos Damage to Enemies within 3 metres
Deals 25% of current Mana as Chaos Damage to you when Effect ends
melting maelstrom.flavour: What is life, but a dreamlike spiral of panic?

maligaro s virtuosity.name: Maligaro's Virtuosity
mods: Your Critical Hit Chance cannot be Rerolled
maligaro s virtuosity.flavour: Maligaro operated effortlessly, with great speed and terrible consequences.

for utopia.name: For Utopia
mods: Defend with 200% of Armour during effect
for utopia.flavour: "It may be centuries hence, but I still hold utmost faith. The Saviour will rise, and mankind will be free."

effigy of cruelty.name: Effigy of Cruelty
mods: Critical Hits with Spells apply 3 Stacks of Critical Weakness
effigy of cruelty.flavour: The horrors we imagined as children still exist somewhere in the dark...

against the darkness.name: Against the Darkness
mods: Notable Passive Skills in Radius also grant Gain 4% of Damage as Extra Cold Damage
Notable Passive Skills in Radius also grant +1% to Maximum Lightning Resistance
against the darkness.flavour: After the fires, in the depths of the Winter of the World, all life in the Vastiri banded together. Whether serpent, hyena, human, or golem, hated enemies clasped hand to claw, built refuge, and fought side by side against the Abyssals. Thus, the Third Pact was born.

adonia s ego.name: Adonia's Ego
mods: +3 to Level of all Spell Skills
-10% to all Elemental Resistances per Power Charge
adonia s ego.flavour: Adonia rose with eyes afire, emanating a ghastly aura, and broke off a carving from the wall of the Throne Room. "You think me powerless without my wand? Insult me again!"

olroth s resolve.name: Olroth's Resolve
mods: Regenerate 3.1% of maximum Runic Ward per second during Effect
Gain Guard equal to Current Runic Ward for 10 seconds when Effect ends
olroth s resolve.flavour: Olroth the Gallant, tireless and true, he fights for me, he fights for you!

uhtred s chalice.name: Uhtred's Chalice
mods: Lose 5% Life per second while you have no Runic Ward during Effect
Mana Recovery from Flasks can Overflow maximum Mana during Effect
uhtred s chalice.flavour: Uhtred drank. Verisium burned through his veins. He gazed at death's face. With all his strength, he turned instead to the stars, and witnessed Truth.

ingenuity.name: Ingenuity
mods: 29% increased bonuses gained from left Equipped Ring
30% increased bonuses gained from right Equipped Ring
ingenuity.flavour: Experiments with geomancy taught the Maji more than they ever expected.

doryani s prototype.name: Doryani's Prototype
mods: +100% of Armour also applies to Lightning Damage
Enemies in your Presence have Lightning Resistance equal to yours
Lightning Resistance does not affect Lightning damage taken
doryani s prototype.flavour: "This was the first step in some grand design, lost to the ages, now ours to decipher." - Dominus, High Templar

alpha s howl.name: Alpha's Howl
alpha s howl.flavour: Nature respects the strong And paints the snow red With the blood of the weak

shavronne s satchel.name: Shavronne's Satchel
mods: Life Recovery from Flasks also applies to Energy Shield
shavronne s satchel.flavour: Bring mystery to life. Again and again.

ventor s gamble.name: Ventor's Gamble
ventor s gamble.flavour: In a blaze of glory, An anomaly defying all odds The "unkillable" beast met the divine And Ventor met his latest trophy.

heroic tragedy.name: Heroic Tragedy
mods: Remembrancing 5002 songworthy deeds by the line of Vorana Passives in radius are Conquered by the Kalguur
heroic tragedy.flavour: They believed themselves courageous and selfless, but that bravery became the doom at their door.

the black cat.name: The Black Cat
mods: Lightning Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Unlucky during effect
the black cat.flavour: The most beloved member of every Brinerot crew is the one that refuses to do any actual work.

grip of kulemak.name: Grip of Kulemak
mods: You and Allies in your Presence have 16% increased Cast Speed
You and Allies in your Presence have 14% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
grip of kulemak.flavour: Drink deeply of the Well. Let the Abyss coil within.

cospri s will.name: Cospri's Will
mods: Curses you inflict have infinite Duration
Curses you inflict can affect Hexproof Enemies
Withered you inflict has infinite Duration
cospri s will.flavour: Curse their vile Council, They cast me aside as if I am some bastard child. If they only knew the power I possess.

valako s vice.name: Valako's Vice
mods: 100% of Fire damage Converted to Lightning damage
valako s vice.flavour: Unlike the other gods, when he was born from the volcano, Valako rode the clouds of ash into the thundering sky.

hysseg s claw.name: Hysseg's Claw
hysseg s claw.flavour: In a time of great need, surrounded by Abyssals, the Wayward Druid came to the Sun Clan's aid. It is a debt they have never forgotten.

prism of belief.name: Prism of Belief
mods: +3 to Level of all Ice Shot Skills

hateforge.name: Hateforge
mods: Gain a random Charge on reaching Maximum Rage, no more than once every 3.78 seconds
Lose all Rage on reaching Maximum Rage
hateforge.flavour: The first Karui born on the fringes of the Vaal empire developed a blood fever born of corruption.

revered resin.name: Revered Resin
mods: Life Flasks gain 0.2 charges per Second
revered resin.flavour: The sacred sap flows slowly, but surely.

nebuloch.name: Nebuloch
mods: Attacks consume an Endurance Charge to Critically Hit
Take 83 Chaos damage per second per Endurance Charge
nebuloch.flavour: They hoped that, trapped in its prison, the creature would age and perish. But time would not touch the fiend.

defiance of destiny.name: Defiance of Destiny
mods: Recover 43% of Missing Life before being Hit by an Enemy
defiance of destiny.flavour: The respect of Karui warriors is hard to earn, but lasts a lifetime... and beyond.

decree of loyalty.name: Decree of Loyalty
mods: Convert 1% of maximum Life to twice as much Armour per 1% Chaos Resistance above 0%
Defend with 221% of Armour while you have Energy Shield
Damage over Time cannot bypass your Energy Shield
decree of loyalty.flavour: "Hold firm. Let no word but the Mothers' turn your head. Through your unfaltering fealty, you achieve perfection."

morior invictus.name: Morior Invictus
mods: 358% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield
+12% to Chaos Resistance per Socket filled
+56 to maximum Life per Socket filled
+10% to all Elemental Resistances per Socket filled
morior invictus.flavour: The Unblinking Eye did not cower and wail. They stood against the end.

polcirkeln.name: Polcirkeln
mods: Enemies Chilled by your Hits can be Shattered as though Frozen
polcirkeln.flavour: I rule the north A legacy earned Time and time again Sing Meginord's song!

constricting command.name: Constricting Command
mods: Require 4 fewer enemies to be Surrounded
constricting command.flavour: "Be vigilant, Nezahul! When the serpent is cornered, does it give up? No... It waits. Then it bites the first hand it finds. The danger of numbers is all in your mind!" - Viper Napuatzi, instructing Royal Commander Nezahul

undying hate.name: Undying Hate
mods: Glorifying the defilement of 2429 souls in tribute to Amanamu Passives in radius are Conquered by the Abyssals Desecration makes this item unstable
undying hate.flavour: They believed themselves driven by necessity, but that desperation made them monstrous.

the brass dome.name: The Brass Dome
mods: Take no Extra Damage from Critical Hits
the brass dome.flavour: The turtle's shell one day becomes its tomb.

fireflower.name: Fireflower
mods: +6 to Level of all Fire Skills
Take 106 Fire Damage when you Ignite an Enemy
fireflower.flavour: Tale-women in training drink of a painful desert fruit. Fire, they learn, springs from agony.

trampletoe.name: Trampletoe
mods: Deal 30% of Overkill damage to enemies within 2 metres of the enemy killed
trampletoe.flavour: The truly mighty are never outnumbered.

thrillsteel.name: Thrillsteel
thrillsteel.flavour: We may fight, and we may die, but in these moments of blood and battle, we truly live.

ironbound.name: Ironbound
mods: 31% chance to Chain an additional time
5% increased Block chance per 100 total Item Armour on Equipped Armour Items
Hits with this weapon have 2 to 5 Added Physical Damage per 1% Block Chance
Arrows Return if they have Pierced a target which had Fully Broken Armour
ironbound.flavour: Each crest was a Thane's word, bolted to Ivor's bow. They would join the Count's side, or die by his hands.

serle s grit.name: Serle's Grit
mods: Skills which Empower an Attack have 18% chance to not count that Attack
49 to 89 added Physical Thorns damage per Runic Plate
serle s grit.flavour: A common soldier from a common family kept hammering into the night after each grueling march, his eyes afire with starlight and determination. Few suspected that he would one day become the greatest among them.

vestige of darkness.name: Vestige of Darkness
mods: Physical damage from Hits Contributes to Chill Magnitude and Freeze Buildup
Enemies in your Presence are Blinded
vestige of darkness.flavour: "Your covetous hands bring the Unlight ever closer to consuming your realm."

rise of the phoenix.name: Rise of the Phoenix
mods: +25% to Fire Resistance while on Low Life
Regenerate 3% of maximum Life per second
Regenerate 3% of maximum Life per second while on Low Life
rise of the phoenix.flavour: My bearer shall be guarded by flame, for I am the phoenix, forever radiant in glory.

ligurium talisman.name: Ligurium Talisman
mods: Life Regeneration is applied to Energy Shield instead

gifts from above.name: Gifts from Above
mods: 25% increased Rarity of Items Dropped by Enemies killed with a Critical Hit
You have Consecrated Ground around you while stationary
gifts from above.flavour: God blesses those who bless themselves.

the adorned.name: The Adorned
mods: 144% increased Effect of Jewel Socket Passive Skills containing Corrupted Magic Jewels
the adorned.flavour: At their height, the Vaal glittered under the sun. A decade, a century, an aeon of prosperity... now nothing more than a passing wonder.

silks of veneration.name: Silks of Veneration
mods: Current Energy Shield also grants Elemental Damage reduction
silks of veneration.flavour: Hallowed Dordalus was cast into the pit as a heretic, but his piety was so great, he would not burn. He rose again, lauded, his faith forever changed... but not the way the Templar believed.

grand spectrum.name: Grand Spectrum
mods: 2% increased Spirit per socketed Grand Spectrum

sacrosanctum.name: Sacrosanctum
mods: 17% of Damage taken Recouped as Life
Damage taken Recouped as Life is also Recouped as Energy Shield
sacrosanctum.flavour: The Twilight Order rejected the gods, choosing instead to put their faith in each other.

blood of the warrior.name: Blood of the Warrior
mods: Effect is not removed when Unreserved Life is Filled
30% of Damage taken during effect Recouped as Life
Gain 5 Rage when Hit by an Enemy during effect
No Inherent loss of Rage during effect
blood of the warrior.flavour: "Tukohama may be asleep, but he still gives us his strength. A small needle, an offering, and a vial... drink deeply, my son, and you will more than survive the coming battle... you will thrive."

soul mantle.name: Soul Mantle
mods: +1 to maximum number of Summoned Totems
Inflicts a random Curse on you when your Totems die, ignoring Curse limit
soul mantle.flavour: The greatest mistakes cause suffering long after they have been made

atziri s splendour.name: Atziri's Splendour
mods: +1 to Level of all Corrupted Skill Gems
Only Soul Cores can be Socketed in this item
This item gains bonuses from Socketed Soul Cores as though it was also a Helmet
atziri s splendour.flavour: "When you have nothing to hide, you have nothing to fear." - Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

runeseeker s call.name: Runeseeker's Call
mods: Only Runes can be Socketed in this item
runeseeker s call.flavour: Smithed from ancient metal wrought from the very stars. It is a means to call upon them, for one capable of wielding it.

sire of shards.name: Sire of Shards
mods: Spells fire 4 additional Projectiles Spells fire Projectiles in a circle
sire of shards.flavour: That which was broken may yet break.

rathpith globe.name: Rathpith Globe
mods: Non-Channelling Spells have 3% increased Critical Hit Chance per 100 maximum Life
Non-Channelling Spells deal 6% increased Damage per 100 maximum Life
rathpith globe.flavour: The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts, and left a mountain of twitching dead.

liminal coil.name: Liminal Coil
mods: Magnitudes of Curses you inflict are zero
Curses you inflict ignore Curse limit
Spell Hits Gain 27% of Damage as Extra Chaos Damage per Curse on target
Spell Hits Gain 30% of Damage as Extra Physical Damage per Curse on target
liminal coil.flavour: In that moment, Viridi's bones became branches, weaving over the Darkness. She coiled around the nothing, trapping it within her everything.

leopold s applause.name: Leopold's Applause
mods: Your Hits can Penetrate Elemental Resistances down to a minimum of -50%
leopold s applause.flavour: "Keep smiling. The deepest cut comes not from insults, but from false praise."

the unborn lich.name: The Unborn Lich
the unborn lich.flavour: In ghastly pits beneath the world, Kulemak grows countless new bodies, each more powerful than the last. Not all of his abominations survive.

temporalis.name: Temporalis
mods: 11% of Damage taken Recouped as Life
16% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana
temporalis.flavour: The final element the tale-women mastered was Time itself.

andvarius.name: Andvarius
andvarius.flavour: Danger is the price of wealth.

leer cast.name: Leer Cast
mods: Allies in your Presence deal 50% increased Damage
leer cast.flavour: For none of us are as cruel as all of us.

the prisoner s manacles.name: The Prisoner's Manacles
mods: Debuffs you inflict have 30% increased Slow Magnitude
the prisoner s manacles.flavour: Only once did Maligaro wonder if he'd gone too far. His greatest success took three entire legions to capture.

valako s roar.name: Valako's Roar
mods: Used when you take Lightning damage from a Hit
Grants a Frenzy Charge on use
valako s roar.flavour: The sea swells, the sky thunders; two ships tilt at odds. Flashes of light show only swinging axes... and a grin.

nightscale.name: Nightscale
mods: 150% increased Mana Regeneration Rate if you've dealt a Critical Hit Recently
Cannot Regenerate Mana if you haven't dealt a Critical Hit Recently
nightscale.flavour: Diamora sings not for hunger, but for longing.

atziri s disdain.name: Atziri's Disdain
mods: Gain 18% of maximum Life as Extra maximum Energy Shield
12% of Damage taken bypasses Energy Shield
atziri s disdain.flavour: They screamed her name in adulation as they gave their very lives. She looked on with impatience.

wondertrap.name: Wondertrap
mods: 50% increased Rarity of Items found when on Low Life

opportunity.name: Opportunity
mods: Effect is not removed when Unreserved Life is Filled
Used when you release a skill with Perfect Timing
Skills have 80% longer Perfect Timing window during effect
opportunity.flavour: "Calculations complete, and He is assembled. Our immaculate tactics are set in motion."

call of the brotherhood.name: Call of the Brotherhood
mods: 100% of Lightning Damage Converted to Cold Damage
call of the brotherhood.flavour: Forged by three brothers so that they may recognize each other across any distance of time or travel.

darkness enthroned.name: Darkness Enthroned
mods: 100% increased effect of Socketed Augment Items
This item gains bonuses from Socketed Items as though it was Gloves
darkness enthroned.flavour: Kulemak sat triumphant, raising the crown. Darkness coiled the world in eternal night. Victory, a mere moment, came crashing down. No conqueror, no conquered, only searing Light.

snakepit.name: Snakepit
mods: Left ring slot: Projectiles from Spells cannot Chain
Left ring slot: Projectiles from Spells Fork
Right ring slot: Projectiles from Spells cannot Fork
snakepit.flavour: They wrap around you until your blood turns as cold as theirs.

veilpiercer.name: Veilpiercer
mods: Curses you inflict can affect Hexproof Enemies
Curses you inflict spread to enemies within 3 metres when Cursed enemy dies
Gain 1 Dark Whisper every second there is a Cursed Enemy in your Presence
22% increased Damage with Hits against targets in your Presence
veilpiercer.flavour: The tribe revelled wildly, unaware that each fruit they ate further bound their continuity to the fog's. In time, the merest touch could break their reality.

evergrasping ring.name: Evergrasping Ring
mods: Allies in your Presence Gain 30% of Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
Enemies in your Presence Gain 10% of Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
evergrasping ring.flavour: Power comes to those who seek Death comes to those who reach

fury of the king.name: Fury of the King
mods: Bear Skills Convert 80% of Physical Damage to Fire Damage
Skills which require Glory generate 5 Glory every 2 seconds
Enemies in your Presence have Exposure
fury of the king.flavour: Gruthkul was the Mother of Despair... but one day, the Father will return, and discover the fate of his children.

svalinn.name: Svalinn
mods: Chance to Block Damage is Lucky
You take 1% of damage from Blocked Hits
svalinn.flavour: The priests found the Great Shield the night it fell to Middengard, but it was the smiths who delved into the secrets it held.

fixation of yix.name: Fixation of Yix
mods: Allies in your Presence have 49% increased Critical Hit Chance
Allies in your Presence have 50% increased Critical Damage Bonus
Allies in your Presence have 18% increased Attack Speed
Allies in your Presence have 19% increased Cast Speed
fixation of yix.flavour: He knew not why he was changing, only that he wanted to hold his family close...

myris uxor.name: Myris Uxor
myris uxor.flavour: The end always comes sooner than we think.

the last lament.name: The Last Lament
mods: Leeches 7.62% of Physical Damage as Life
18% chance to load a bolt into all Crossbow skills on Kill
Sacrifice 300 Life to not consume the last bolt when firing
the last lament.flavour: "And here we shall remain... trapped in our symphony of eternal anguish. Artist and Composer, their fates entwined for all of time." - Adamantia Brektov, the Composer

horror s flight.name: Horror's Flight
mods: Adds 22 to 33 Chaos Damage to Attacks
Gain 1 Fear Incarnate when you Cull a target
horror s flight.flavour: If fear doesn't kill you, I will.

loreweave.name: Loreweave
mods: Adds 2 to 8 Physical Damage to Attacks
You gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill
Enemies Chilled by your Hits can be Shattered as though Frozen
loreweave.flavour: The collector need not even speak. Each ring regaled them with tales of his conquest.

reverie.name: Reverie
mods: Cannot use Life Flasks Non-Unique Life Flasks apply their Effects constantly Recovery from Life Flasks cannot be Instant Recovery from your Life Flasks cannot be applied to anything other than you
reverie.flavour: "Do not despair! Give yourself to the woods! Become empty, and the Goddess will find you. From within her roots... you shall be restored." - Cirel of Caer Tarth

decree of acuity.name: Decree of Acuity
mods: Gain 28% of Evasion Rating as extra Armour
The Effect of Blind on you is reversed
decree of acuity.flavour: "Focus. Hone your mind. Your lessers rely on the tangible. Shed your senses, and raze them from this physical realm."

forsaken bangle.name: Forsaken Bangle
mods: Used when you take Chaos damage from a Hit
50% of Chaos damage you prevent when Hit Recouped as Life and Mana during effect
forsaken bangle.flavour: Among the Templars, a secret few ate the sins of others. They bore this burden to empower their hidden Order.

lioneye s glare.name: Lioneye's Glare
mods: +2 metres to Dodge Roll distance if you haven't Dodge Rolled Recently
-1 metre to Dodge Roll distance if you've Dodge Rolled Recently
Repeatable Attacks with this Bow Repeat +2 times if no enemies are in your Presence
lioneye s glare.flavour: "Kinslayer, you dishonour your own traditions to turn the tide of battle! Let us see which is stronger... Karui savagery or the might of the Empire!" - General Marceus Lioneye

essentia sanguis.name: Essentia Sanguis
mods: Adds 1 to 50 Lightning damage to Attacks
Life Leech is Converted to Energy Shield Leech
essentia sanguis.flavour: The darkest clouds clashed and coupled, giving birth to four lightning children of hate.

astramentis.name: Astramentis
mods: -4 Physical Damage taken from Attack Hits
astramentis.flavour: Mindless rage will shake the world, Cunning lies will bend it. Reckless haste will break the world, And into darkness send it.

goregirdle.name: Goregirdle
goregirdle.flavour: Bleeding just means you're still alive.

guiding palm of the eye.name: Guiding Palm of the Eye
mods: Gain 25% of Damage as Extra Cold Damage
Allies in your Presence deal 20 to 34 added Attack Cold Damage
50% of your Base Life Regeneration is granted to Allies in your Presence
Grants effect of Guided Freezing Shrine
guiding palm of the eye.flavour: "With piercing eyes, you saw through the Stillness. Undulating as one, you gloriously covered all in white. But... I can bear you no longer." The Dreamer whispered with fogging breath, ice creeping down his hand.

ming s heart.name: Ming's Heart
mods: Gain 58% of Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
24% reduced Global Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield
ming s heart.flavour: Ming slew Tranquillity Took Chaos for his wife And on Her immortal finger He placed his Heart

scold s bridle.name: Scold's Bridle
mods: Take 94% of Mana Costs you pay for Skills as Physical Damage
scold s bridle.flavour: "The sharper the pain, the sharper the mind. A curious paradox." - Shavronne of Umbra

sierran inheritance.name: Sierran Inheritance
mods: All Damage taken from Hits Contributes to Magnitude of Chill inflicted on you
The Effect of Chill on you is reversed
sierran inheritance.flavour: Born among the high peaks, many Mutewind live their entire lives in snow and ice.

redblade banner.name: Redblade Banner
mods: Enemies in your Presence count as having double Power

greed s embrace.name: Greed's Embrace
greed s embrace.flavour: Some would question if the risk was worth it. The rest were already dead.

the hammer of faith.name: The Hammer of Faith
mods: Every 10 seconds, gain a random non-damaging Shrine buff for 20 seconds
the hammer of faith.flavour: The secret Order endured by publicly praying however the Templars demanded. One day, justice would fall upon them...

arakaali s gift.name: Arakaali's Gift
mods: Recover Life equal to 16% of Mana Flask's Recovery Amount when used
Recover Mana equal to 20% of Life Flask's Recovery Amount when used
arakaali s gift.flavour: Devotees of the Goddess of Lust needed never fear her sting.

choir of the storm.name: Choir of the Storm
mods: Critical Hits Ignore Enemy Monster Lightning Resistance
Trigger Lightning Bolt Skill on Critical Hit
choir of the storm.flavour: But the fool did not bow. The fool stood and questioned. And the fool was unwritten.

breath of the mountains.name: Breath of the Mountains
mods: Used when you take Cold damage from a Hit
Grants a Power Charge on use
breath of the mountains.flavour: "To scrape the sky, to touch the clouds themselves, is to know true freedom." - Mutewind saying

dream fragments.name: Dream Fragments
mods: You cannot be Chilled or Frozen
dream fragments.flavour: Doryani stumbled into a realm of madness And awoke its Master.

cloak of defiance.name: Cloak of Defiance
mods: 50% of Damage is taken from Mana before Life
cloak of defiance.flavour: When the throat roars, As eyes weep, When the hand grips hard With trembling fingers, When belly twists Yet legs stand strong, That is the work Of the Defiant Heart.

quill rain.name: Quill Rain
quill rain.flavour: "The rain of a thousand quills that whittle present into past, life into death." - Rigwald of the Ezomytes

crown of eyes.name: Crown of Eyes
mods: Increases and Reductions to Spell damage also apply to Attacks
crown of eyes.flavour: Turning, gazing, blinking, behold the eyes of void. Burning, razing, drinking, your mind is destroyed.

sunsplinter.name: Sunsplinter
mods: +1 to Level of all Fire Skills
+4 to Level of all Cold Skills
+2 to Level of all Lightning Skills
sunsplinter.flavour: "Lundara held back the hordes, while Solerai rose to split the sky. With a single stroke, she ended the Winter of the World." - Wranga, tale-woman of the Wahida akhara

hollow focus.name: Hollow Focus
hollow focus.desc: While active, ethereal bells periodically appear near you. Your Hits immediately destroy the bells, creating a shockwave that damages nearby enemies and causes a Heavy Stun on enemies that are Primed for Stun. The bells are themselves always Primed for Stun, they can be Culled, and Hits against them are always Critical Hits.

magnified area ii.name: Magnified Area II
magnified area ii.desc: Supports any skill with an area of effect, making it larger.

cooldown recovery ii.name: Cooldown Recovery II
cooldown recovery ii.desc: Supports skills with Cooldowns, increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

overabundance ii.name: Overabundance II
overabundance ii.desc: Supports Skills which have a Limit, increasing that Limit at the cost of their duration. Only applies to restrictions that use the word "Limit".

close combat ii.name: Close Combat II
close combat ii.desc: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage to enemies based on how close they are to you.

execute ii.name: Execute II
execute ii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on Low Life.

barrage.name: Barrage
barrage.desc: Ready a volley of arrows or spears, Empowering your next Repeatable Bow or Projectile Spear Attack to Repeat multiple times. Consumes your Frenzy Charges on use to add additional repeats.

rapid casting ii.name: Rapid Casting II
rapid casting ii.desc: Supports Spells, causing them to cast faster.

heightened charges.name: Heightened Charges
heightened charges.desc: Supports any Skill that Consumes Charges, granting a chance for benefits of that Consumption to be doubled.

olroth s conviction.name: Olroth's Conviction
olroth s conviction.desc: Supports skills that can Empower a specific number of other skills, causing them to apply to more skill uses.

efficiency ii.name: Efficiency II
efficiency ii.desc: Supports any skill, making it cost less to use. Cannot support skills which reserve Spirit.

whirling slash.name: Whirling Slash
whirling slash.desc: Perform a circular slash that kicks up a Whirlwind around you, Slowing enemies and Blinding them in its area of effect. Leaving the area collapses the storm, dealing damage and causing Knockback.

rage iii.name: Rage III
rage iii.desc: Supports Melee Attacks, causing them to grant Rage on Hit. Supported Skills have signficantly higher Attack speed while you or supported minion are not at maximum Rage.

rapid attacks iii.name: Rapid Attacks III
rapid attacks iii.desc: Supports Attacks, causing them to Attack faster at the cost of Damage.

blazing critical.name: Blazing Critical
blazing critical.desc: Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Critical Hits with Supported Skills imbue all of your Attacks with Fire damage for a duration.

heightened accuracy ii.name: Heightened Accuracy II
heightened accuracy ii.desc: Supports Attacks, causing them to gain Accuracy, and never miss against Enemies on full Life.

rigwald s ferocity.name: Rigwald's Ferocity
rigwald s ferocity.desc: Supports Attack skills, granting them Attack Speed at the cost of Damage or Damage at the cost of Attack Speed depending on Weapon Set they are used in. Does not modify skills used by Minions.

herald of ice.name: Herald of Ice
herald of ice.desc: While active, Shattering an enemy with a non-Herald Attack Hit will cause an icy explosion that deals Attack damage to surrounding enemies.

elemental armament ii.name: Elemental Armament II
elemental armament ii.desc: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more Elemental damage.

elemental focus.name: Elemental Focus
elemental focus.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more Elemental Damage but be unable to inflict Elemental Ailments.

longshot ii.name: Longshot II
longshot ii.desc: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage from farther away.

ambush.name: Ambush
ambush.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Critically Hit enemies on full life.

twister.name: Twister
twister.desc: Whip up a twister with a flick of your Spear. The twister moves forward erratically, Blinding and repeatedly Hitting enemies within. If a twister touches a Whirlwind from your other skills, it Consumes the Whirlwind to create additional twisters that deal more damage. Passing over Elemental Ground Surfaces or Consuming an elemental Whirlwind will grant twisters extra damage of that element.

retreat iii.name: Retreat III
retreat iii.desc: Supports Skills which create Projectiles. Supported Skills deal more damage with Projectiles if you have struck with a Melee Hit in the last two seconds, but cannot themselves deal Melee Damage.

projectile acceleration iii.name: Projectile Acceleration III
projectile acceleration iii.desc: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel faster, and causing increases and reductions to Projectile speed to also apply to Damage.

pinpoint critical.name: Pinpoint Critical
pinpoint critical.desc: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to Critically Hit more often but deal less damage with Critical Hits.

rakiata s flow.name: Rakiata's Flow
rakiata s flow.desc: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, causing those Hits to treat Enemy Elemental Resistances as inverted.

sniper s mark.name: Sniper's Mark
sniper s mark.desc: Mark a target. The next Critical Hit the target receives Activates the Mark, Consuming it to deal extra damage and grant you a Frenzy Charge.

charged mark.name: Charged Mark
charged mark.desc: Supports Mark Skills, causing them to Trigger Charged Mark when they are Activated. Charged Mark creates Shocked Ground at the target's location.

charge profusion ii.name: Charge Profusion II
charge profusion ii.desc: Supports skills that can generate Charges, giving them a chance to generate an additional Charge when they do so, as well as a chance to generate an additional Charge of a random type.

eternal mark.name: Eternal Mark
eternal mark.desc: Supports Mark Skills, causing them to not be Consumed the first time they are Activated.

righteous descent.name: Righteous Descent
righteous descent.desc: Leap into the air carried by divine wings, damaging enemies with your spear where you land. If there is a Fragment of Divinity near you or the targeted location, this attack will Consume it when you leap to become Empowered, dealing more damage and granting life and mana recovery. This skill does not use up its Cooldown when empowered.

culling strike ii.name: Culling Strike II
culling strike ii.desc: Supports Attack Skills, causing them to Cull Rare and Unique Enemies on Hit, and increasing the threshold at which they will Cull Enemies.

purity of fire.name: Purity of Fire
purity of fire.desc: Emit an Aura that boosts the Fire Resistance of you and Allies in your Presence.

vitality ii.name: Vitality II
vitality ii.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain Life Regeneration while the Skill is active.

cannibalism ii.name: Cannibalism II
cannibalism ii.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to recover Life on kill while the Skill is active.

clarity ii.name: Clarity II
clarity ii.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Mana Regeneration while the Skill is active.

ghost dance.name: Ghost Dance
ghost dance.desc: While active, causes you to periodically gain Ghost Shrouds. If you are Hit while you have a Ghost Shroud, it is immediately consumed to recover Energy Shield based on your Evasion.

precision i.name: Precision I
precision i.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Accuracy while the Skill is active.

combat frenzy.name: Combat Frenzy
combat frenzy.desc: While active, grants you a Frenzy Charge when you Freeze, Electrocute or Pin an enemy. This can only occur once every few seconds.

trinity.name: Trinity
trinity.desc: Become attuned to all Elements building up Fire, Cold and Lightning Affinity based off the highest Elemental Damage type dealt by your Hits. Your Elemental Damage is enhanced the more Affinity of any type you have.

fire mastery.name: Fire Mastery
fire mastery.desc: Supports Fire skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

spear throw.name: Spear Throw
spear throw.desc: Hurl your Spear with force. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if you have one to cause the Spear to explode at the end of its flight.

charge regulation.name: Charge Regulation
charge regulation.desc: While active, you gain powerful Buffs based on your active Charges. However, maintaining the Buff Consumes Charges every few seconds.

perpetual charge.name: Perpetual Charge
perpetual charge.desc: Supports skills that consume Power, Frenzy or Endurance Charges on use, giving them a chance not to remove each Charge while still gaining the benefits of consuming them.

garukhan s resolve.name: Garukhan's Resolve
garukhan s resolve.desc: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which do not already have some Condition for use. Supported Skills have a maximum Critical Hit chance, but will Bifurcate Critical Hit Chance.

armour explosion.name: Armour Explosion
armour explosion.desc: Supports Attacks and Warcries, causing them to trigger a Fiery explosion when they Fully Break an enemy's Armour.

armour break iii.name: Armour Break III
armour break iii.desc: Supports Skills that Hit Enemies, causing those Hits to Break Armour based on a portion of Physical Damage dealt. On Fully Breaking Armour with Supported Skills, you have a chance to gain an Endurance Charge.

uruk s smelting.name: Uruk's Smelting
uruk s smelting.desc: Supports any skill, causing Armour Break it inflicts to be stronger. Fully Breaking Armour with Supported Skills permanently increases the Physical Damage taken by those affected, up to a cap.

her declaration.name: Her Declaration
her declaration.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing enemies that enter your Presence to become Intimidated while the Skill is active.

precision ii.name: Precision II
precision ii.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Accuracy while the Skill is active.

cold mastery.name: Cold Mastery
cold mastery.desc: Supports Cold skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

prolonged duration ii.name: Prolonged Duration II
prolonged duration ii.desc: Supports any skill that has a duration, making that duration longer.

hit and run.name: Hit and Run
hit and run.desc: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which do not already have some Condition for use. Supported Skills can only be used after you have moved a certain distance, but have massively increased Skill Speed. Cannot support Skills which have a cooldown.

rapid casting iii.name: Rapid Casting III
rapid casting iii.desc: Supports Spells, causing them to cast faster for each different Spell you've cast in the last eight seconds.

impurity.name: Impurity
impurity.desc: Emit an Aura that boosts the Chaos Resistance of you and Allies in your Presence.

knockback.name: Knockback
knockback.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to Knock Back enemies.

herbalism ii.name: Herbalism II
herbalism ii.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Life recovery from Flasks while the Skill is active.

bow shot.name: Bow Shot
bow shot.desc: Fire an arrow with your Bow.

mana leech.name: Mana Leech
mana leech.desc: Supports Attacks, causing their Physical damage to Leech Mana.

cold attunement.name: Cold Attunement
cold attunement.desc: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing them to Gain Cold Damage but deal less Fire and Lightning Damage.

rapid attacks ii.name: Rapid Attacks II
rapid attacks ii.desc: Supports Attacks, causing them to Attack faster.

frozen spite.name: Frozen Spite
frozen spite.desc: Supports Attack Skills, causing them to create Ice Fragments on killing Frozen Enemies. Cannot Support Totem Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.

tornado shot.name: Tornado Shot
tornado shot.desc: Fire a skyward shot that whips up a Tornado where it lands, dealing Physical damage over time and Hindering enemies standing in it. Arrows, thrown Spears and Crossbow bolts fired at the Tornado are sucked into it, causing the Tornado to spit out a ring of copied Projectiles. Copied Projectiles cannot be copied again, even by further Tornados.

durability.name: Durability
durability.desc: Supports Skills which create objects that are destroyed after being Hit a number of times, allowing for them to last for additional Hits. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

blind ii.name: Blind II
blind ii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to Blind on Hit with increased effect.

physical mastery.name: Physical Mastery
physical mastery.desc: Supports Physical skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

snipe.name: Snipe
snipe.desc: Channel to charge up your bow before releasing a powerful shot. Releasing with Perfect Timing causes the arrow to explode on impact and Consume Freeze on directly Hitting. Consuming Freeze enhances the explosion.

concentrated area.name: Concentrated Area
concentrated area.desc: Supports any skill with an area of effect, causing that area to be smaller but any area damage it deals to be higher.

window of opportunity ii.name: Window of Opportunity II
window of opportunity ii.desc: Supports Channelling skills that have special effects if released with Perfect Timing, causing them to deal much more damage and grant Perfect Deflection if released with Perfect Timing but reducing the Perfect Timing window.

cold penetration.name: Cold Penetration
cold penetration.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits Penetrate enemy Cold resistance.

inexorable critical i.name: Inexorable Critical I
inexorable critical i.desc: Supports any skill you use yourself that Hits enemies, causing it to accumulate Critical Hit chance over time.

ice shot.name: Ice Shot
ice shot.desc: Fire an icy arrow that sprays a cone of ice shards when it hits a target.

ice bite ii.name: Ice Bite II
ice bite ii.desc: Supports damaging skills and Warcries you use yourself. Freezing an enemy with supported skills infuses your damage with Cold damage for a short time.

fork.name: Fork
fork.desc: Supports Projectile skills, making their Projectiles Fork.

rhoa mount.name: Rhoa Mount
rhoa mount.desc: Harnesses a Companion Rhoa you can mount while you're wielding a Bow or Spear. While mounted you can use Bow, thrown Spear, and Mark Skills, and are much less slowed while using Skills, but being Hit will cause Heavy Stun buildup. While you aren't mounted, the Rhoa will attack your enemies alongside you with its beak, but can be damaged.

romira s requital.name: Romira's Requital
romira s requital.desc: Supports Skills that create Companions which can be damaged. Minions created by Supported Skills take a portion of Hit Damage you would otherwise have taken, but have lowered maximum Life. A percentage of Damage taken this way is Recouped by you as Life.

elemental army.name: Elemental Army
elemental army.desc: Supports skills which create Minions, bolstering the Elemental Resistances of those Minions. Cannot support skills which create undamageable Minions.

meat shield ii.name: Meat Shield II
meat shield ii.desc: Supports skills which create Minions, granting them less damage taken but making them deal less damage.

wind dancer.name: Wind Dancer
wind dancer.desc: While active, periodically grants stages of a buff that gives you more Evasion per stage. Being Hit by an Enemy while you have this buff consumes all stages to damage and Knock Back enemies around you.

pin ii.name: Pin II
pin ii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing its Physical damage to Pin enemies but making it unable to Stun, as well as granting Critial Hit Chance against Immobilised enemies.

maim.name: Maim
maim.desc: Supports Attacks, causing them to Maim enemies.

freezing mark.name: Freezing Mark
freezing mark.desc: Mark a target, making them more susceptible to being Frozen. When the Marked target is Frozen, the Mark Activates, granting you a Buff which gives extra Cold damage and Consuming the Mark. Marking another target while you have the Buff will remove the Buff.

mark of siphoning ii.name: Mark of Siphoning II
mark of siphoning ii.desc: Supports Mark Skills, causing enemies they Mark to Leech Life and Mana to you when you Hit them with Attacks.

execute iii.name: Execute III
execute iii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on Low Life, as well as dealing more damage while you are on Low Life.

life leech iii.name: Life Leech III
life leech iii.desc: Supports Attacks, causing their Physical damage to Leech Life and preventing Leech gained this way from being removed at full Life.

breachlord s rift.name: Breachlord's Rift
breachlord s rift.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to Break Armour of enemies it Freezes or Electrocutes.

armour demolisher ii.name: Armour Demolisher II
armour demolisher ii.desc: Supports any skill, causing Armour Break it inflicts to be stronger.

mark for death ii.name: Mark for Death II
mark for death ii.desc: Supports Mark Skills. Enemies affected by Supported Marks will have their Armour Broken by Physical Damage they take.

herald of thunder.name: Herald of Thunder
herald of thunder.desc: While active, killing Shocked enemies with a non-Herald Attack Hit will cause subsequent Attack Hits to release lightning bolts which deals Attack damage to all surrounding enemies.

embitter.name: Embitter
embitter.desc: Supports Skills which can Damage Enemies with Hits, causing all sources of Damage Gained to instead be treated as Damage Gained as extra Cold for Supported Skills.

freeze.name: Freeze
freeze.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more effective at Freezing enemies.

eonyr s thunder.name: Eonyr's Thunder
eonyr s thunder.desc: Supports any Skill which can deal damage. Lightning damage from Supported Skills can inflict Electrocute, but Supported Skills cannot inflict Shock. Enemies slain while Electrocuted by Supported Skills explode, dealing a percentage of their maximum Life as Lightning damage.

rageforged ii.name: Rageforged II
rageforged ii.desc: Supports any damaging skill that you use or Trigger yourself, causing it to spend Rage to deal more damage, with a chance to skip spending Rage while still benefitting as though it had. If you don't have enough Rage to spend, the damage bonus will not apply.

overreach.name: Overreach
overreach.desc: Supports Attack Skills which deal Damage in an Area. Supported Skills have significantly increased Area of Effect, but are less Accurate against nearby targets.

salvo.name: Salvo
salvo.desc: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which fire Projectiles, Sealing them over time. The Seals are broken when used, causing additional Projectiles to be fired. Projectiles from Supported Skills are fired in random directions. Cannot Support Skills which require Combo, have a Cooldown or which already gain Seals.

direstrike ii.name: Direstrike II
direstrike ii.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Attack Damage while on Low Life while the Supported Skill is active.

uhtred s omen.name: Uhtred's Omen
uhtred s omen.desc: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them additional levels provided exactly one other support is used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

lightning mastery.name: Lightning Mastery
lightning mastery.desc: Supports Lightning skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

empowered sparks ii.name: Empowered Sparks II
empowered sparks ii.desc: Supports Skills which generate Charges. When generating Power Charge with Supported Skills, Empower some of your Attacks to Trigger Spark Projectiles on use.

nova projectiles i.name: Nova Projectiles I
nova projectiles i.desc: Supports Projectile Skills, making them fire Projectiles in a circle. Does not Support Skills which rain down Projectiles from above.

ois n s oath.name: Oisín's Oath
ois n s oath.desc: Supports Skills which Hit enemies, causing their Mana Leech to recover based on Elemental damage instead of Physical damage.

esh s prowess.name: Esh's Prowess
esh s prowess.desc: Supports Lightning skills that Hit targets, granting them an additional level and causing them to only roll the minimum or maximum value for Lightning damage. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

blindside.name: Blindside
blindside.desc: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills are more likely to Critically Hit Blinded Enemies, and deal more Damage with Critical Hits against Blinded Enemies, but cannot themselves inflict Blind.

mana remnants.name: Mana Remnants
mana remnants.desc: Conjure surging arcane energy to restore your Mana. While active, enemies you kill affected by Elemental Ailments have a chance to spawn a Mana Remnant, and Critically Hitting a target with Elemental Ailments spawns a Mana Remnant every few seconds. Picking up a Mana Remnant grants you Mana which can Overflow maximum Mana.

harmonic remnants ii.name: Harmonic Remnants II
harmonic remnants ii.desc: Supports Skills which create Remnants, allowing those Remnants to be collected from further away, with a chance to create an additional Remnant.

remnant potency iii.name: Remnant Potency III
remnant potency iii.desc: Supports Skills which create Remnants, making those Remnants more powerful, but delaying their effect.

lightning penetration.name: Lightning Penetration
lightning penetration.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits Penetrate enemy Lightning resistance.

cool headed.name: Cool Headed
cool headed.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Ignite applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.

second wind ii.name: Second Wind II
second wind ii.desc: Supports Skills which have a cooldown, giving them extra uses of that cooldown. Cannot support Meta, instant, or Triggered Skills, and cannot modify the Skills of Minions.

rend.name: Rend
rend.desc: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and perform a wide slash with your wingtip claws. Consumes a Power Charge if possible to grant you a Buff that gives you extra Lightning damage. While you have the Buff, Rend covers a much larger area but is slower.

hollow form.name: Hollow Form
hollow form.desc: Channel to create fleeting images of your astral self near the target location. The images perform a Socketed Melee Attack once then vanish, targeting the closest enemy if possible. The images cannot perform Channelled Skills or Conditional Skills. Consuming a Power Charge creates additional images.

whirling assault.name: Whirling Assault
whirling assault.desc: Advance while hitting enemies around you with a series of spinning Strikes.

mobility.name: Mobility
mobility.desc: Supports skills that can be used while moving, allowing you to move faster while using them.

vorana s siege.name: Vorana's Siege
vorana s siege.desc: Supports skills which Hit targets and have an area of effect, increasing the affected area and causing it to Hit Isolated targets harder.

pin iii.name: Pin III
pin iii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing its Physical damage to Pin enemies but making it unable to Stun. Pin buildup caused by Supported Skill is lessened, but Pin duration is significantly longer.

slow potency.name: Slow Potency
slow potency.desc: Supports any skill, causing inflicted Slows to be more powerful.

flicker strike.name: Flicker Strike
flicker strike.desc: Teleport to a enemy and Strike them. Consumes Power Charges to perform additional teleporting Strikes on nearby enemies.

devour.name: Devour
devour.desc: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and devour a Corpse or Cullable enemy, and additional nearby Corpses. For each enemy or corpse devoured, you regenerate life and gain a Power Charge. If the target is far enough away, you will leap to them and damage nearby enemies where you land. Targeting nearby enemies or corpses will not perform a leap or a Slam.

thrill of the kill ii.name: Thrill of the Kill II
thrill of the kill ii.desc: Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Culling a Shocked enemy with Supported Skills infuses all of your Attacks with Lightning damage and grants an increased chance to Shock for a short time.

pounce.name: Pounce
pounce.desc: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and leap to a target location, damaging enemies in an area around where you land. Predator's Mark will be Triggered targeting the highest Rarity enemy Hit, or if a Mark gem is socketed into this Skill, that Mark will be Triggered instead. Using this Skill allows any Wolf Minions you have to leap immediately.

opening move.name: Opening Move
opening move.desc: Supports Travel Skills which Hit enemies. Hits with Supported Skills against enemies on full life will Daze.

refutation.name: Refutation
refutation.desc: Spends all your Ward to gain a short-duration Buff that causes you to Block all Blockable Hits and apply Parried to enemies from which you've Blocked a Hit. This Buff is removed if you are Heavy Stunned. While this Buff is active, you cannot be Light Stunned, but Blocking too much damage may Heavy Stun you.

atziri s communion.name: Atziri's Communion
atziri s communion.desc: Supports Persistent Skills, making them Reserve Life instead of Spirit. Cannot Support Skills which create Minions.

warm blooded.name: Warm Blooded
warm blooded.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Freeze applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.

uhtred s augury.name: Uhtred's Augury
uhtred s augury.desc: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them additional levels provided exactly two other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

remnant potency i.name: Remnant Potency I
remnant potency i.desc: Supports Skills which create Remnants, making those Remnants more powerful.

uhtred s exodus.name: Uhtred's Exodus
uhtred s exodus.desc: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them many additional levels provided no other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

eternal rage.name: Eternal Rage
eternal rage.desc: While active, you constantly regenerate Rage.

blasphemy.name: Blasphemy
blasphemy.desc: Turn socketed Curse skills into vile Auras, applying their effects to all nearby enemies.

temporal chains.name: Temporal Chains
temporal chains.desc: Curse all enemies in an area, Slowing them and making other effects on them expire more slowly.

heightened curse.name: Heightened Curse
heightened curse.desc: Supports Curse Skills, magnifying their power.

mysticism ii.name: Mysticism II
mysticism ii.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Spell Damage while on full Energy Shield while the Supported Skill is active.

spell totem.name: Spell Totem
spell totem.desc: Consume any combination of 3 Power and/or Endurance Charges to raise a Totem that uses socketed Spells. Cannot use Skills with Cooldowns.

grim pillars.name: Grim Pillars
grim pillars.desc: Spend Runic Ward to cause damaging Ice-Crystal spears to erupt from the ground around you. These spears can be destroyed for an explosion of Cold damage.

urgent totems iii.name: Urgent Totems III
urgent totems iii.desc: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Skills to place Totems much more quickly. Totems created by Supported Skills have increased Attack and Cast Speed.

zenith ii.name: Zenith II
zenith ii.desc: Supports Spell Skills. Supported Skills have increased Mana cost Efficiency and deal more damage while you are above 90% of your maximum Mana. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

elemental weakness.name: Elemental Weakness
elemental weakness.desc: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their Elemental Resistances.

hex bloom.name: Hex Bloom
hex bloom.desc: Supports Curses, spreading their effects when a Cursed enemy dies.

entangle.name: Entangle
entangle.desc: Conjures a rootbound fissure that crawls forward, damaging enemies in its path. While the fissure persists, vines lash out from it and attach to nearby enemies, damaging and Slowing them.

branching fissures i.name: Branching Fissures I
branching fissures i.desc: Supports Skills which create Fissures in the ground, causing them to create additional secondary Fissures which branch off from the primary fissure, with lowered area of effect and Damage.

biting frost ii.name: Biting Frost II
biting frost ii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to deal more damage to Frozen enemies but consume their Freeze, leaving them Chilled. Cannot support skills that Consume Freeze.

arcane surge.name: Arcane Surge
arcane surge.desc: Supports Spells you cast yourself, tracking the mana you spend to cast them. Spending enough mana grants a burst of Mana Regeneration and Cast Speed.

frost bomb.name: Frost Bomb
frost bomb.desc: Create a pulsing Orb of frost. Each pulse inflicts Elemental Exposure on nearby enemies. When the Orb's duration ends, it Detonates, dealing Cold damage to surrounding enemies and leaving behind a Cold Infusion.

potent exposure.name: Potent Exposure
potent exposure.desc: Supports Skills which apply Exposure to Enemies, increasing the effect of applied Exposure.

magnified area i.name: Magnified Area I
magnified area i.desc: Supports any skill with an area of effect, making it larger.

barrier invocation.name: Barrier Invocation
barrier invocation.desc: While active, gains Energy when your Energy Shield is damaged by Enemy Hits. Using the Invocation once sufficient Energy is gathered will consume the Energy to trigger socketed Spells, and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough Energy.

frost wall.name: Frost Wall
frost wall.desc: Create a wall of Ice Crystals which holds back enemies. The Crystals explode if sufficiently damaged, or if pushed hard enough, damaging nearby enemies. Consumes a Lightning Infusion if possible to add another Lightning explosion if destroyed.

arc.name: Arc
arc.desc: An arc of Lightning stretches from the caster to a targeted enemy and Chains on to other nearby enemies. Consumes a Lightning Infusion if possible to deal more damage and Chain further.

shock.name: Shock
shock.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Shock.

archmage.name: Archmage
archmage.desc: While active, causes your Non-Channelling Spells to cost additional mana and deal extra Lightning damage, both based on your maximum Mana.

dialla s desire.name: Dialla's Desire
dialla s desire.desc: Supports any Skill which has levels, increasing the level and Quality, while reducing the cost and Reservation.

meditate.name: Meditate
meditate.desc: Channel to Recharge Energy Shield and allow that Recharge to Overflow. Channelling ends when you take damage or your Energy Shield is fully Overflowed.

steadfast ii.name: Steadfast II
steadfast ii.desc: Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself, granting you higher Stun Threshold and Ailment Threshold while Channelling them.

malice.name: Malice
malice.desc: While active, emits an Aura that continuously inflicts Critical Weakness on enemies in your Presence.

mana drain.name: Mana Drain
mana drain.desc: Leech Mana from an enemy over a prolonged period, as well as briefly Hindering them.

arctic armour.name: Arctic Armour
arctic armour.desc: While active, conjures an icy barrier that gains stages over time. While the barrier has stages, Melee Attacks that hit you will remove a stage to cause a burst of ice that deals Cold Spell damage to the attacker.

tul s stillness.name: Tul's Stillness
tul s stillness.desc: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Freeze Buildup.

convalescence.name: Convalescence
convalescence.desc: While active, grants a skill that you can use to instantly begin Recharging Energy Shield and gain a Buff for a duration that prevents that Recharge being interrupted. The Buff is removed at maximum Energy Shield and the skill cannot be used while Energy Shield is full.

clarity i.name: Clarity I
clarity i.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Mana Regeneration while the Skill is active.

second wind iii.name: Second Wind III
second wind iii.desc: Supports Skills which have a cooldown, giving them extra uses of that cooldown and causing them to recover your Life when a Skill is used and goes on cooldown. Cannot support Meta, instant, or Triggered Skills, and cannot modify the Skills of Minions.

cast on critical.name: Cast on Critical
cast on critical.desc: While active, gains Energy when you Critically Hit enemies and triggers socketed Spells on reaching maximum Energy.

comet.name: Comet
comet.desc: Call down a mass of ice from the sky, dealing high damage at the targeted location. Targeting close to you will cause you to jump back as you cast. Consumes a Fire Infusion if possible to cause a devastating blast of ice and fire.

boundless energy ii.name: Boundless Energy II
boundless energy ii.desc: Supports Meta Skills. Supported Skills generate Energy significantly faster.

spell cascade.name: Spell Cascade
spell cascade.desc: Supports Cascadable Spells, causing them to Cascade to either side of the target area, along a randomly chosen axis.

orb of storms.name: Orb of Storms
orb of storms.desc: Create an Orb of electricity that fires Chaining Lightning bolts at nearby enemies. The Orb leaves behind a Lightning Infusion Remnant when it expires.

unleash.name: Unleash
unleash.desc: Supports Repeatable Spells you cast yourself, Sealing them over time. The Seals are broken when cast, each causing the Spell to Repeat. Cannot support skills with a Cooldown or which already gain Seals.

living lightning ii.name: Living Lightning II
living lightning ii.desc: Supports Skills which cause Damaging Hits. Living Lightning Minions are created when dealing Lightning damage with Supported Skills - bundles of living electricity that target nearby enemies with Chaining Attacks. Enemies will not directly engage these Minions, and can pass through them. Does not modify skills used by Minions.

fortress ii.name: Fortress II
fortress ii.desc: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to be created in a circle instead but deal less Hit damage and have lowered Area of Effect.

verglas.name: Verglas
verglas.desc: Supports Skills you use yourself which can Hit Enemies. Supported Skills Gain a percentage of their Damage as Cold Damage when you destroy Ice Crystals.

spark.name: Spark
spark.desc: Launch a spray of sparking Projectiles that travel erratically along the ground until they hit an enemy or expire. Consumes a Cold Infusion if possible to fire many sparks in a circle.

considered casting.name: Considered Casting
considered casting.desc: Supports Spell Skills that Hit Enemies and you cast yourself, boosting Damage at the cost of Cast Speed.

pierce iii.name: Pierce III
pierce iii.desc: Supports Projectile skills, making their Projectiles Pierce an unlimited number of enemies, losing damage as they do so.

ritualistic curse.name: Ritualistic Curse
ritualistic curse.desc: Supports Curse skills, causing them to cover a larger area but take longer to Curse enemies.

sigil of power.name: Sigil of Power
sigil of power.desc: Place a Sigil on the ground, providing a powerful Spell Damage Buff to you and Allies while standing in it. The Buff becomes more powerful the more mana you spend while standing in the Sigil.

elemental conflux.name: Elemental Conflux
elemental conflux.desc: Tap into a current of raw and unpredictable Elemental power, causing you to deal greatly more damage of a randomly chosen Element. The Element affected changes frequently, though the same Element can be affected multiple times in succession.

solar orb.name: Solar Orb
solar orb.desc: Create a fiery Orb that periodically releases fiery pulses. Enemies that are very close to the Orb are Ignited. Flameblast can target a Solar Orb to be centred on the Orb instead of your location.

ancestral call ii.name: Ancestral Call II
ancestral call ii.desc: Supports Strikes you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every few seconds. Cannot Support Channelled Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.

medved s felling.name: Medved's Felling
medved s felling.desc: Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself, causing them to attack faster the more Rage you have and grant Rage on Hit, but also making you lose Life based on your Rage when using them.

uul netol s embrace.name: Uul-Netol's Embrace
uul netol s embrace.desc: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Break Armour.

tempest bell.name: Tempest Bell
tempest bell.desc: Build Combo by successfully Striking Enemies with other skills. After reaching maximum Combo, use this skill to cause the Bell on your staff to grow to massive size as you drop it on the ground. The Bell damages enemies on impact and can be Hit by your skills, creating a damaging shockwave. Elemental Ailments applied to the Bell cause its shockwaves to deal extra damage of the corresponding type, and Hits which would have caused Knockback increase the area of effect of the shockwaves.

impale.name: Impale
impale.desc: Supports Attacks, causing them to Impale on Hit but making them unable to Extract Impale themselves.

heft.name: Heft
heft.desc: Supports Skills which deal Damage, increasing the maximum Physical Damage of their Hits.

heavy swing.name: Heavy Swing
heavy swing.desc: Supports Melee Attacks, boosting their Physical damage at the cost of Attack Speed.

branching fissures ii.name: Branching Fissures II
branching fissures ii.desc: Supports Skills which create Fissures in the ground, causing them to create additional secondary Fissures which branch off from the primary fissure, with lowered area of effect and Damage.

herald of ash.name: Herald of Ash
herald of ash.desc: While active, enemies you sufficiently Overkill with non-Herald Attacks will cause an explosion that Ignites nearby enemies based on the Overkill damage dealt.

power siphon.name: Power Siphon
power siphon.desc: Attempt to rip the lifeforce from an enemy. Enemies within Culling range will be highlighted and instantly killed on Hit, granting a Power Charge. Can only target Enemies in Culling range.

berserk.name: Berserk
berserk.desc: While active, strengthens your Rage, but causes you to lose Life while not losing Rage.

cast on elemental ailment.name: Cast on Elemental Ailment
cast on elemental ailment.desc: While active, gains Energy when you Freeze, Shock, or Ignite enemies, and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.

living bomb.name: Living Bomb
living bomb.desc: Plant a seed of Fire inside an enemy. Dealing enough damage to the enemy, or killing it outright, causes the seed to explode, dealing damage in an area and leaving behind a Fire Infusion Remnant.

creeping chill.name: Creeping Chill
creeping chill.desc: Supports any Skill that creates Ice Crystals, causing that Skill to Consume a Power Charge if possible to create Chilled Ground around the Crystal.

firestorm.name: Firestorm
firestorm.desc: Rain a storm of flaming bolts over the targeted area. Can Consume all three types of Elemental Infusion, creating a much larger storm when Fire-Infused, causing lightning bolts when Lightning-Infused, and raining ice bolts when Cold-Infused.

uhtred s constellation.name: Uhtred's Constellation
uhtred s constellation.desc: Supports non-instant skills which have a cooldown, granting them two additional cooldown uses and more damage per different skill with a cooldown you have used recently.

zarokh s refrain.name: Zarokh's Refrain
zarokh s refrain.desc: Supports Cascadable Spells you cast yourself. Supported Spells Echo thrice, but are given a Cooldown. Cannot support skills which already have a Cooldown.

projectile acceleration ii.name: Projectile Acceleration II
projectile acceleration ii.desc: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel faster, and granting them a chance to Pierce Enemies.

runic extraction.name: Runic Extraction
runic extraction.desc: Supports any Skill that deals damage. Enemies you kill with supported Skills have a chance to drop a Verisium Infusion Remnant.

arbiter s ignition.name: Arbiter's Ignition
arbiter s ignition.desc: Supports Fire Spell Skills causing you to gain Elemental Archon when Igniting with them.

pinnacle of power.name: Pinnacle of Power
pinnacle of power.desc: Consume all Power Charges to master the elements, gaining Elemental Damage and the ability to apply Elemental Ailments with other damage types. Can only be used while you have maximum Power Charges.

powered by verisium.name: Powered by Verisium
powered by verisium.desc: Spends Ward to generate Verisium Infusions, which can be used in place of any Elemental Infusions.

unbound avatar.name: Unbound Avatar
unbound avatar.desc: Gain Unbound Fury by inflicting Elemental Ailments with Hits on enemies. Once you reach maximum Unbound Fury, consume it to become Unbound for a duration, vastly augmenting your Elemental prowess.

atziri s impatience.name: Atziri's Impatience
atziri s impatience.desc: Supports Skills you use yourself that have Cooldowns, dramatically increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover, but causing you to lose Life, Mana, and Energy Shield when they are used. Cannot Support Meta Skills or Persistent Skills, or modify the Skills of Minions.

siphon elements.name: Siphon Elements
siphon elements.desc: While active, has a chance to create an Infusion Remnant when you Freeze, Shock or Ignite a target.

skeletal warrior.name: Skeletal Warrior
skeletal warrior.desc: Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Warriors.

ice strike.name: Ice Strike
ice strike.desc: Perform a fast icy Strike. Using this Attack three times in quick succession causes a final strike that is slower and more powerful.

shattering palm.name: Shattering Palm
shattering palm.desc: Dash to an enemy and Strike them with an Attack that manifests a wave of cold, coating nearby enemies in shards of ice. Dealing enough damage to these enemies will shatter the shards, causing an icy explosion that deals Attack damage.

charged staff.name: Charged Staff
charged staff.desc: Consume all Power Charges to charge your Quarterstaff with electricity, adding Lightning damage and a Lightning shockwave to your Quarterstaff Attacks. Reusing this skill while the Buff is active adds to the Buff's duration and damage.

esh s radiance.name: Esh's Radiance
esh s radiance.desc: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Shock.

doedre s undoing.name: Doedre's Undoing
doedre s undoing.desc: Supports Curse Skills. Supported Skills create an area which Curses Enemies within it, and spawns Witchtoads in that area. Witchtoads leap at eneimes that get close, and seek out Cursed enemies with higher aggression. Dark Consequences will be Triggered when they hit enemies with their leap, violently exploding the Witchtoad.

deadly herald.name: Deadly Herald
deadly herald.desc: Supports Herald Skills, making their triggered effects deal more damage at the expense of higher Spirit cost.

reaper s invocation.name: Reaper's Invocation
reaper s invocation.desc: While active, gains Energy when you kill an enemy with a Melee Attack. Using the Invocation once sufficient Energy is gathered will consume the Energy to trigger socketed Spells, and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough Energy.

profane ritual.name: Profane Ritual
profane ritual.desc: Mark a Corpse with a profane rune, dealing Chaos damage over time to nearby enemies. When the ritual is complete the Corpse is consumed and you gain a Power Charge.

spellslinger.name: Spellslinger
spellslinger.desc: While active, gains Energy when you cast Spells. Using the Invocation once sufficient Energy is gathered will consume the Energy to trigger socketed Spells, and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough Energy.

vilenta s propulsion.name: Vilenta's Propulsion
vilenta s propulsion.desc: Supports Spell Skills that fire Projectiles, causing increases and reductions to cast speed to also apply to Projectile speed.

energy retention.name: Energy Retention
energy retention.desc: Supports Meta Skills. Supported Skills gain a chance to partially Refund a portion of Energy cost when Triggering or Invoking other Skills.

fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.desc: Launch a large ball of Fire which explodes on impact. The explosion Consumes a Fire Infusion if possible to launch a ring of smaller firebolts.

ignite iii.name: Ignite III
ignite iii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Ignite and causing inflicted Ignites to deal their damage more quickly.

fire penetration ii.name: Fire Penetration II
fire penetration ii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits ignore enemy Fire resistance.

zarokh s revolt.name: Zarokh's Revolt
zarokh s revolt.desc: Supports Repeatable Spells you cast yourself, Sealing them over time and giving them a moderate Cooldown. The Seals are broken when cast, each causing the Spell to Repeat. Cannot support skills which already have a Cooldown or gain seals.

sione s temper.name: Sione's Temper
sione s temper.desc: Supports Projectile Spells. Supported Spells have an increasingly higher chance to fire many additional Projectiles in a circle, resetting when they do.

explosive transmutation.name: Explosive Transmutation
explosive transmutation.desc: While active, picking up Remnants Triggers a deadly explosion, dealing damage at the location of the Remnant based on the type of Remnant picked up.

ball lightning.name: Ball Lightning
ball lightning.desc: Fire a slow-moving Projectile that moves through enemies. The Projectile itself does not Hit enemies, but repeatedly discharges bolts of Lightning at nearby enemies. Consumes a Fire Infusion if possible to slow down over time, create Ignited Ground as it travels, and explode dealing Fire damage in an Area after it dissipates.

multishot ii.name: Multishot II
multishot ii.desc: Supports Projectile skills, making them fire extra Projectiles. Also lowers Attack and Cast speed of supported skills, as well as lessening their damage.

lightning exposure.name: Lightning Exposure
lightning exposure.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Exposure when inflicting Shock.

innervate.name: Innervate
innervate.desc: Supports damaging skills you use yourself. Killing a Shocked enemy with supported skills imbues your damage with Lightning damage for a short time.

enfeeble.name: Enfeeble
enfeeble.desc: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, making them deal less damage.

into the breach.name: Into the Breach
into the breach.desc: Create a Breach around you, allowing you to see nearby Flames of Chayula. You are considered to be in a Breach while this skill is active.

khatal s rejuvenation.name: Khatal's Rejuvenation
khatal s rejuvenation.desc: Supports Skills that generate Remnants. Picking up Remnants from Supported Skills grants Khatal's Rejuvenation.

blink.name: Blink
blink.desc: While active, replaces your dodge roll with a short-cooldown Spell that allows you to tunnel through space, instantly reappearing a medium distance away.

discipline.name: Discipline
