discipline.desc: Emit an Aura that grants you and Allies in your Presence additional Total Energy Shield.

selfless remnants.name: Selfless Remnants
selfless remnants.desc: Supports Skills that generate Remnants, causing those Remnants to affect Allies in your Presence when collected instead of you.

wolf pack.name: Wolf Pack
wolf pack.desc: Activate to summon a pack of Wolf Companions. The pack treated as a single Companion for effects that count or limit Companions, regardless of the number of Wolves in the pack.

amanamu s tithe.name: Amanamu's Tithe
amanamu s tithe.desc: Supports Persistent Minion Skills, granting a chance when Supported Minions die for you to gain an Abyssal Monster Modifier.

minion instability.name: Minion Instability
minion instability.desc: Supports skills which create Minions, causing them to violently explode when reduced to Low Life.

feeding frenzy i.name: Feeding Frenzy I
feeding frenzy i.desc: Supports skills which create Minions, making them deal and take more damage. Cannot support skills which create undamageable Minions.

infernal legion i.name: Infernal Legion I
infernal legion i.desc: Supports skills which create Minions which can be damaged, causing them and enemies near them to Ignite. The damage of the Ignite is based on the Life of the supported Minion.

loyalty.name: Loyalty
loyalty.desc: Supports Skills that create Companions which can be damaged. Minions created by Supported Skills take a portion of Hit Damage you would otherwise have taken, but have lowered maximum Life.

skeletal cleric.name: Skeletal Cleric
skeletal cleric.desc: Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Clerics that heal other minions and revive fallen Skeletons.

barkskin.name: Barkskin
barkskin.desc: While active, taking Hit damage from enemies to your Energy Shield causes you to gain Armour for a short duration. Armour gained from multiple Hits can stack. The total Armour gained from this Skill cannot exceed the Item Armour on your Equipped Armour Items.

sacrifice.name: Sacrifice
sacrifice.desc: While active, your undead Reviving Minions can be used in place of Corpses by your skills, but your Minions Revive more slowly.

strong hearted.name: Strong Hearted
strong hearted.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Shock applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.

time of need.name: Time of Need
time of need.desc: While active, periodically invokes divine blessings to heal you and remove Curses and Elemental Ailments from you.

overwhelming presence.name: Overwhelming Presence
overwhelming presence.desc: While active, emits an Aura that makes enemies in your Presence easier to Stun and inflict Elemental Ailments upon.

withering presence.name: Withering Presence
withering presence.desc: While active, emits an Aura that periodically Withers enemies in your Presence.

chaos mastery.name: Chaos Mastery
chaos mastery.desc: Supports Chaos skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

alchemist s boon.name: Alchemist's Boon
alchemist s boon.desc: While active, grants you Flask charges passively and causes Life and Mana recovery from your Flasks to also apply to Allies in your Presence.

purity of lightning.name: Purity of Lightning
purity of lightning.desc: Emit an Aura that boosts the Lightning Resistance of you and Allies in your Presence.

mirage deadeye.name: Mirage Deadeye
mirage deadeye.desc: While active, firing a ranged Projectile Attack will create a Mirage that uses socketed ranged Attacks for a short duration, then vanish.

explosive grenade.name: Explosive Grenade
explosive grenade.desc: Fire a bouncing Grenade that unleashes a devastating fiery blast when its fuse expires.

payload.name: Payload
payload.desc: Supports Skills which fire Grenades, giving fired Grenades a chance to activate again, but lengthening their cooldowns.

lightning attunement.name: Lightning Attunement
lightning attunement.desc: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing them to Gain Lightning Damage but deal less Cold and Fire Damage.

explosive shot.name: Explosive Shot
explosive shot.desc: Load your Crossbow with flaming bolts that explode on impact. The explosion will cause any Grenades in its area of effect to also explode.

ratha s assault.name: Ratha's Assault
ratha s assault.desc: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to load multiple extra bolts and attack faster. Supported Skills cannot reload normally, instead loading bolts when you Dodge.

cluster grenade.name: Cluster Grenade
cluster grenade.desc: Fire a bouncing Grenade that explodes when its fuse expires, throwing out a ring of mini Grenades that explode when they come to a stop.

short fuse ii.name: Short Fuse II
short fuse ii.desc: Supports Skills which Detonate after some amount of time has elapsed, massively shortening the time before Detonation at the cost of Damage.

deliberation.name: Deliberation
deliberation.desc: Supports skills that can be used while moving, causing you to move slower while using them, but granting more damage in exchange.

gas grenade.name: Gas Grenade
gas grenade.desc: Fire a bouncing Grenade that causes a burst of Poison gas when its fuse expires, damaging enemies and leaving behind a growing Poison cloud. Burning effects or Detonator skills will cause the cloud to explode in a fiery blast.

oil grenade.name: Oil Grenade
oil grenade.desc: Fire a bouncing Grenade that bursts in a spray of Oil when the fuse expires or when it impacts an Enemy, dealing minimal damage but covering the ground and nearby enemies in Oil. Oil created this way can be Ignited by Detonator Skills or Ignited Ground.

lifetap.name: Lifetap
lifetap.desc: Supports any Skill, turning its Mana cost into a Life cost. Does not support Skills which reserve Spirit.

cannibalism i.name: Cannibalism I
cannibalism i.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to recover Life on kill while the Skill is active.

cackling companions.name: Cackling Companions
cackling companions.desc: Activate to summon a cackle of Hyena Companions. The cackle is treated as a single Companion for effects that count or limit Companions, regardless of the number of Hyenas in the cackle. Hyenas whoop when they first appear, Hindering nearby enemies, and have a chance to Maim enemies they Hit.

ice tipped arrows.name: Ice-Tipped Arrows
ice tipped arrows.desc: Ready your active Bow or Spear, Empowering your next Repeatable Bow or Projectile Spear Attacks to Convert Physical Damage to Cold Damage and Trigger Ice Fragments on Hit. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending a Frenzy Charge. Cannot Empower Sustained Skills.

short fuse i.name: Short Fuse I
short fuse i.desc: Supports Skills which Detonate after some amount of time has elapsed, shortening the time before Detonation.

repulsion.name: Repulsion
repulsion.desc: Target an area and Curse enemies within with a Verisium Rune, inflicting them with Fragility. Hitting these enemies causes the Curse to Trigger an explosion to deal damage in an area and apply significant Knockback to other enemies near the Cursed target, with more Stun buildup based on the Fragility on the target Hit.

bhatair s vengeance.name: Bhatair's Vengeance
bhatair s vengeance.desc: Supports Attacks and Warcries you use yourself. Freezing an enemy with Supported Skills infuses you and your allies with Cold damage for a short time.

mark of siphoning.name: Mark of Siphoning
mark of siphoning.desc: Supports Mark Skills, causing enemies they Mark to Leech Mana to you when you Hit them with Attacks.

last gasp.name: Last Gasp
last gasp.desc: Supports Skills that create Persistent Minions, causing those Minions to fight on when they are fatally wounded, dying after a short duration.

brutus brain.name: Brutus' Brain
brutus brain.desc: Supports skills which create Minions, causing those Minions to be unable to deal or take Damage. Cannot support skills which create undamageable Minions.

minion mastery.name: Minion Mastery
minion mastery.desc: Supports Minion skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

stoicism ii.name: Stoicism II
stoicism ii.desc: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills steadily gain more Damage, up to a cap. This Damage bonus is reset if you Dodge Roll or use a Travel Skill.

mirage archer.name: Mirage Archer
mirage archer.desc: While active, dodge rolling will create a Mirage that uses socketed ranged Attacks for a short duration, then vanish.

maul.name: Maul
maul.desc: Shapeshift into a Bear and rake enemies with your claws, generating Rage on Hit.

life leech ii.name: Life Leech II
life leech ii.desc: Supports Attacks, causing their Physical damage to Leech Life.

stun iii.name: Stun III
stun iii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to build up Stun significantly more quickly, at the cost of Damage.

shield wall.name: Shield Wall
shield wall.desc: Ram your Shield into the ground, throwing up a wall of earth. Enemies can attack your wall segments, and your Slams, Warcries, and Shield Charge will instantly shatter them all. The segments explode when shattered, damaging enemies in front of and around them.

ancestral warrior totem.name: Ancestral Warrior Totem
ancestral warrior totem.desc: Consume 3 Endurance Charges to Raise a Totem that conjures spirit warriors. Each warrior uses a socketed Mace Skill once, then disappears. Cannot use Channelling Skills or Skills with Cooldowns.

armour breaker.name: Armour Breaker
armour breaker.desc: Strike with a forceful blow, knocking enemies back and weakening their Armour.

bleed iv.name: Bleed IV
bleed iv.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more Melee Physical Damage to Bleeding Enemies, but be unable to inflict Bleeding itself. Supported Skills also inflict Incision on Hit.

uhtred s rite.name: Uhtred's Rite
uhtred s rite.desc: Supports skills with Cooldowns, causing them to grant Overflowing Chalice when used. Supported skills deal more damage during the effect of your Life Flask and have increased Mana Cost Efficiency during the effect of your Mana Flask.

xibaqua s rending.name: Xibaqua's Rending
xibaqua s rending.desc: Supports Skills that leap into the air, causing Corpses in the area you land to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies.

holy descent.name: Holy Descent
holy descent.desc: Supports Skills that leap into the air, causing them to create Consecrated Ground when you land.

helbrym s hide.name: Helbrym's Hide
helbrym s hide.desc: Supports Shapeshifting Skills, causing them to grant Helbrym's Composure for a brief duration when they cause you to Shapeshift. Shapeshifting into a different form before the Buff expires causes it to be removed without effect.

ferocious roar.name: Ferocious Roar
ferocious roar.desc: Shapeshift into a Bear and roar in defiance, immediately gaining Rage if there are enemies nearby and Empowering subsequent Attacks to Break Armour. Alternatively, socketing a human-form Warcry into this Skill triggers that Warcry instead, and augments its damage and area. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.

infernal cry.name: Infernal Cry
infernal cry.desc: Perform a Warcry, Empowering subsequent Melee Attacks if there are enemies nearby. Enemies in the warcry's area are destabilised and will Combust on death. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.

enraged warcry i.name: Enraged Warcry I
enraged warcry i.desc: Supports Warcries, causing them to spend Rage to bypass their usual Cooldown.

raging cry.name: Raging Cry
raging cry.desc: Supports Warcry skills, causing them to grant you Rage on use depending on counted monster Power.

profanity ii.name: Profanity II
profanity ii.desc: Supports Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills consume many Corpses on use, dealing more Chaos Damage per Corpse consumed.

fortifying cry.name: Fortifying Cry
fortifying cry.desc: Perform a Warcry that grants Guard and Triggers Shield Wave when subsequent Shield Attacks deal damage. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.

echoing cry.name: Echoing Cry
echoing cry.desc: Supports Warcries. Supported Skills Echo twice, and their area grows larger each time, but are less effective and require you to have travelled a certain distance before use.

inhibitor.name: Inhibitor
inhibitor.desc: Supports any Skill you use or Trigger yourself. Supported Skills cannot consume Charges or Infusion by any means. Cannot Support Skills which require Charges or Infusion to be used.

leap slam.name: Leap Slam
leap slam.desc: Jump into the air, damaging and Knocking Back enemies with your mace where you land. Enemies you would land on are pushed out of the way.

raise shield.name: Raise Shield
raise shield.desc: Raise your Shield to Block all incoming Blockable hits. Release immediately after Blocking when an enemy is close to perform a Shield Bash, damaging and Stunning enemies. While your Shield is raised you cannot be Light Stunned by hits you Block, but Blocking too much damage may Heavy Stun you. You cannot Evade while your Shield is raised, but Evasion instead grants an equal chance to avoid this Heavy Stun buildup.

animus exchange.name: Animus Exchange
animus exchange.desc: Sacrifice a portion of your Life to recover Runic Ward. Runic Ward recovered by this Skill can Overflow.

supercritical.name: Supercritical
supercritical.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage with Critical Hits but have less Critical Hit chance.

atalui s bloodletting.name: Atalui's Bloodletting
atalui s bloodletting.desc: Supports any Skill, turning a portion of its Mana cost into a Life cost. Does not support Skills which reserve Spirit. Supported Skills Gain a portion of their Life cost as extra Physical Damage.

exposing cry.name: Exposing Cry
exposing cry.desc: Supports Warcries. Supported Skills apply Exposure on Hitting enemies.

enraged warcry ii.name: Enraged Warcry II
enraged warcry ii.desc: Supports Warcries, causing them to spend Rage to bypass their usual Cooldown.

ahn s citadel.name: Ahn's Citadel
ahn s citadel.desc: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to instead be created along a fissure.

kaom s madness.name: Kaom's Madness
kaom s madness.desc: Supports Skills which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create many additional fissures at the cost of damage, speed, and area of effect.

cadence.name: Cadence
cadence.desc: Supports Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills gain more Attack speed each time you use them, but will become unusable if used too frequently in a short time frame. Sustained Skills will instead gain Attack speed periodically while being used.

direstrike i.name: Direstrike I
direstrike i.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Attack Damage while on Low Life while the Supported Skill is active.

scavenged plating.name: Scavenged Plating
scavenged plating.desc: While active, uses fragments of armour scavenged from enemies to bolster your own. Fully Breaking an enemy's Armour grants you stacks of Scavenged Plating for a duration based on the enemy's Rarity, and you gain Armour and Thorns per stack. Normal enemies grant 1 stack, Magic enemies grant 2 stacks, Rare enemies grant 5 stacks and Unique enemies grant 10 stacks.

walking calamity.name: Walking Calamity
walking calamity.desc: Build Glory by gaining Rage while already at maximum Rage. When you have maximum Glory, roar to the heavens to bring them down upon your enemies. For the duration of the Skill, meteors rain down around you and you Gain Fire damage and Rage regeneration. This Skill's effects are suppressed if you leave Bear form, but will resume if you return to Bear form before the duration expires.

lunar assault.name: Lunar Assault
lunar assault.desc: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and swipe with your claws, projecting an arc of moonlight and ice forward in a crescent.

herbalism i.name: Herbalism I
herbalism i.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Life recovery from Flasks while the Skill is active.

rampage.name: Rampage
rampage.desc: Shapeshift into a Bear and charge forward, Slamming the ground as you run. Channelling ends after a short amount of time but can be prolonged by spending Rage.

zerphi s infamy.name: Zerphi's Infamy
zerphi s infamy.desc: Supports Attacks and Warcries you use yourself. Supported Skills gain a Glory requirement, and build Glory when you spend Life on Skills. Supported Skills deal more damage and have significantly increased area of effect.

volcanic eruption.name: Volcanic Eruption
volcanic eruption.desc: Supports Melee Strike Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills trigger Volcanic Eruption on Hit against Ignited Enemies.

mark for death.name: Mark for Death
mark for death.desc: Supports Mark Skills. Enemies affected by Supported Marks will have their Armour Broken by Physical Damage they take.

momentum.name: Momentum
momentum.desc: Supports any damaging skill that you use yourself, causing it to deal more damage if you move a sufficient distance while using the skill. Teleportation does not count towards the distance travelled.

prolonged duration i.name: Prolonged Duration I
prolonged duration i.desc: Supports any skill that has a duration, making that duration longer.

savage fury.name: Savage Fury
savage fury.desc: While active, your Fury builds from Attacking enemies. Using this Skill releases your Fury to send you into a bestial frenzy, gaining damage and Onslaught but constantly losing life and forcing you into animal form. The frenzy ends immediately if you return to human form. You cannot gain Fury while in a frenzy.

boneshatter.name: Boneshatter
boneshatter.desc: Attack enemies with a melee Strike. The Strike will cause a Heavy Stun on enemies that are Primed for Stun. Upon causing a Heavy Stun it will also create a Shockwave, dealing a large amount of damage in an area.

culling strike i.name: Culling Strike I
culling strike i.desc: Supports Attack Skills, causing them to Cull Rare and Unique Enemies on Hit.

war banner.name: War Banner
war banner.desc: While active, Attacking enemies builds Glory. When you have maximum Glory, you can place an inspiring Banner for a duration with an Aura that grants you and nearby Allies Attack damage, Attack speed and Accuracy.

daresso s passion.name: Daresso's Passion
daresso s passion.desc: Supports Banner Skills, causing them to require significantly less Glory to use.

refraction iii.name: Refraction III
refraction iii.desc: Supports Banner Skills, causing Enemies within their area to gain Refractive Dissolution, a Debuff which lowers Elemental Resistances.

rageforged i.name: Rageforged I
rageforged i.desc: Supports any damaging skill that you use or Trigger yourself, causing it to spend Rage to deal more damage. If you don't have enough Rage to spend, the damage bonus will not apply.

earthshatter.name: Earthshatter
earthshatter.desc: Slam the ground, sending out a fissure that deals area damage to enemies it passes under and thrusts a spike from the ground when it ends. Warcries performed near the spike will cause it to shatter, damaging surrounding enemies.

aftershock ii.name: Aftershock II
aftershock ii.desc: Supports Slams you use yourself, giving them a chance to create an Aftershock.

brutality iii.name: Brutality III
brutality iii.desc: Supports any skill that deals damage, boosting its Physical damage at the expense of all other Damage Types, as well as giving Hits from that skill a chance to ignore Physical Damage reduction.

fire attunement.name: Fire Attunement
fire attunement.desc: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing them to Gain Fire Damage but deal less Cold and Lightning Damage.

resonating shield.name: Resonating Shield
resonating shield.desc: Repeatedly hammer your Shield with your weapon causing damaging shockwaves in an area around you. Enemies hit by the shockwave lose Armour for a duration. While Channelling Resonating Shield, your Shield is raised and you will Block all incoming Blockable hits.

deadly resolve.name: Deadly Resolve
deadly resolve.desc: Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself. While Channelling Supported Skills, periodically gain stages of Deadly Resolve. Expend a stage of Deadly Resolve when an enemy Hits you to Trigger a deadly slash towards that enemy, dealing more damage based on your Armour.

styrn s mountain.name: Styrn's Mountain
styrn s mountain.desc: Supports Skills that Raise your Shield causing your other melee skills to deal more damage if you block.

sunder.name: Sunder
sunder.desc: Slam the ground, creating a roiling fissure that damages enemies in a sequence of areas in front of you. A number of enemies hit by the wave will release a shockwave, damaging other enemies. Hitting an enemy with Fully Broken Armour applies Sundered Armour, making it take additional increased Physical damage.

fist of war ii.name: Fist of War II
fist of war ii.desc: Supports Slams you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every few seconds.

stun ii.name: Stun II
stun ii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to build up Stun more quickly.

syzygy.name: Syzygy
syzygy.desc: Supports Slam Skills you use yourself. Hits from Supported Skills are considered Crushing Blows against Enemies which are both Ignited and Fully Armour Broken. Hits with Supported Skills that Heavily Stun Ignited and Fully Armour Broken Enemies will Intimidate them.

brink ii.name: Brink II
brink ii.desc: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills build up Stun more quickly, but cannot themselves Stun.

impact shockwave.name: Impact Shockwave
impact shockwave.desc: Supports Melee Strike Skills and Wind Attack Skills, causing them to create an Aftershock that damages enemies around the target when they Heavy Stun an enemy.

tireless.name: Tireless
tireless.desc: Supports Warcry Skills. Attacks Empowered by Supported Skills have a chance not to lower the Empowerment count of Supported Skills when they are used.

encase in jade.name: Encase in Jade
encase in jade.desc: Consume all stacks of Jade to grant Guard based off your maximum Life for each Jade consumed. You cannot gain Jade stacks while you have Guard.

ancestral spirits.name: Ancestral Spirits
ancestral spirits.desc: This skill is Triggered each time you summon a Totem, summoning an Ancestral Spirit Minion to fight for you. If the Totem dies then the Ancestral Spirit triggered by it's summoning will die too.

infernal legion ii.name: Infernal Legion II
infernal legion ii.desc: Supports skills which create Minions which can be damaged, causing them and enemies near them to Ignite. The damage of the Ignite is based on the Life of the supported Minion.

fire exposure.name: Fire Exposure
fire exposure.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Exposure when Igniting.

mortar cannon.name: Mortar Cannon
mortar cannon.desc: Raise a cannon Ballista Totem which uses socketed Grenade Skills, with significantly improved Cooldown Recovery Rate.

voltaic grenade.name: Voltaic Grenade
voltaic grenade.desc: Fire a bouncing Grenade that discharges an Electrocuting Lightning blast when its fuse expires, causing all Lightning Hits against enemies to contribute to Electrocution buildup for a duration.

vitality i.name: Vitality I
vitality i.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain Life Regeneration while the Skill is active.

rapid attacks i.name: Rapid Attacks I
rapid attacks i.desc: Supports Attacks, causing them to Attack faster.

corrupting cry ii.name: Corrupting Cry II
corrupting cry ii.desc: Supports Warcries, Triggering Corrupted Cry to inflict Corrupted Blood on enemies in their area of effect.

vruun s aftermath.name: Vruun's Aftermath
vruun s aftermath.desc: Supports Warcries, causing them to destroy Ice Crystals and Ice Fragments. Supported Skills empower additional Attacks if they destroy enough Ice Crystals and Ice Fragments.

fist of war iii.name: Fist of War III
fist of war iii.desc: Supports Slams you use yourself, providing a very powerful Ancestral Boost infrequently.

rage i.name: Rage I
rage i.desc: Supports Melee Attacks, causing them to grant Rage on Hit.

ricochet ii.name: Ricochet II
ricochet ii.desc: Supports any Skill which creates Projectiles, giving those Projectiles a chance to Chain when impacting terrain.

long fuse ii.name: Long Fuse II
long fuse ii.desc: Supports Skills which have a Detonation Time, causing those Skills to have much higher Detonation Time and detonation damage.

ambrosia ii.name: Ambrosia II
ambrosia ii.desc: Supports Skills you use yourself which damage enemies with Hits. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Mana Flask charges, Gaining a percentage of damage as extra Lightning damage per Mana Flask charge consumed.

window of opportunity i.name: Window of Opportunity I
window of opportunity i.desc: Supports Channelling skills that have special effects if released with Perfect Timing, causing them to deal much more damage if released with Perfect Timing but reducing the Perfect Timing window.

escape shot.name: Escape Shot
escape shot.desc: Leap backwards, firing an icy arrow which can Chill or Freeze enemies around the location from which you escaped. This arrow will create Ice Fragments on impact.

crossbow shot.name: Crossbow Shot
crossbow shot.desc: Fire a bolt from your crossbow.

bounty i.name: Bounty I
bounty i.desc: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more Flask and Charm charges.

bleed i.name: Bleed I
bleed i.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to inflict Bleeding.

armour break i.name: Armour Break I
armour break i.desc: Supports Skills that Hit Enemies, causing those Hits to Break Armour based on a portion of Physical Damage dealt.

runic tempering.name: Runic Tempering
runic tempering.desc: Channel to imbue your armour with Runic Plates. When you are Hit while you have these plates, some of the damage you would take will be prevented, and this skill will cause backlash, dealing your Thorns damage in an area around your attacker.

shield charge.name: Shield Charge
shield charge.desc: Channel to charge in the target direction. You will crash into enemies on your path, stopping your charge and dealing damage to enemies in an area, and extra damage to the enemies you collided with. While charging, your Shield is raised and you will Block all incoming Blockable hits.

flame wall.name: Flame Wall
flame wall.desc: Create a wall of Fire in front of you, which Ignites everything within its area. Any Projectiles fired through the wall by you and Allies deal added Fire damage. Consumes a Lightning Infusion if possible to also add Lightning damage to the Projectiles.

volcanic fissure.name: Volcanic Fissure
volcanic fissure.desc: Slam the ground, creating a branching Molten Fissure that deals damage as it travels and remains for a duration. Using a different Slam on a Molten Fissure creates a spreading Aftershock.

styrn s ferocity.name: Styrn's Ferocity
styrn s ferocity.desc: Supports Shield Skills that Hit enemies, causing those Hits to Crush their targets, additionally causing any Physical Damage Hits against those targets while Crushed to Break their Armour.

close combat i.name: Close Combat I
close combat i.desc: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage to enemies based on how close they are to you.

refraction ii.name: Refraction II
refraction ii.desc: Supports Banner Skills, causing those affected by Auras they create to gain Refractive Plating, a Buff which grants Deflection Rating and causes Armour to partially apply to Elemental Hit Damage.

manifest weapon.name: Manifest Weapon
manifest weapon.desc: Manifest a copy of your main hand Melee Martial Weapon as an immortal Companion to fight by your side. In addition to its standard Strikes, the Manifested Weapon gains an additional Attack depending on its weapon type.

minion splash ii.name: Minion Splash II
minion splash ii.desc: Supports Skills which create Minions which Strike, increasing their Area of Effect and causing those Minions' Strikes to have Melee Splash.

hulking minions.name: Hulking Minions
hulking minions.desc: Supports Skills which summon Persistent Minions. Supported Minions are larger, have more Life, and deal more Damage, but cost significantly more Spirit.

muster.name: Muster
muster.desc: Supports Skills which summon Minions. Supported Minions deal more Damage the more different kinds of Reviving Minions you have summoned.

pain offering.name: Pain Offering
pain offering.desc: Skewer a Skeleton on a bone spike to send nearby Minions into a frenzy as long as the spike remains, making their skills faster and harder hitting. The bone spike is itself a Minion. If it dies, the effect ends immediately.

sacrificial offering.name: Sacrificial Offering
sacrificial offering.desc: Supports Offering Skills. Supported Skills Sacrifice a portion of your life on use, but deal much more damage and have more powerful Buffs in return.

skeletal reaver.name: Skeletal Reaver
skeletal reaver.desc: Activate to summon aggressive, Reviving Skeletal Reavers that can enrage on Command. Skeletal Reavers do more Attack Damage and gain increased Attack speed based on their Rage

skeletal sniper.name: Skeletal Sniper
skeletal sniper.desc: Activate to summon long-ranged, Reviving Skeletal Snipers that can fire a gas arrow on Command.

spectre bloodthief wasp.name: Spectre: Bloodthief Wasp
spectre bloodthief wasp.desc: Summon the spirit of the bound monster as a Reviving Minion.

summon infernal hound.name: Summon Infernal Hound
summon infernal hound.desc: Activate to summon a Reviving Infernal Hound which Ignites enemies near it.

feeding frenzy ii.name: Feeding Frenzy II
feeding frenzy ii.desc: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.

catha s brilliance.name: Catha's Brilliance
catha s brilliance.desc: Supports skills which create Companions, causing enemies near them to be Blinded and Ignited. The damage of the Ignite is based on the Life of the supported Minion.

upwelling i.name: Upwelling I
upwelling i.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing your Minions to deal increased Damage while you are not on full Mana while the Supported Skill is active.

danse macabre.name: Danse Macabre
danse macabre.desc: Supports Offering Skills. Supported Skills have increased Buff effect and deal more damage, but will target an additional skeletal Minion when cast. If there is not an additional skeletal Minion to target, no damage or Buff effect will be granted.

essence harvest.name: Essence Harvest
essence harvest.desc: Supports Skills which create Reviving Persistent Minions. When those Minions die, you Recoup a percentage of your maximum Mana.

skeletal frost mage.name: Skeletal Frost Mage
skeletal frost mage.desc: Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Frost Mages that can envelop your Minions in an icy shield on Command.

tecrod s revenge.name: Tecrod's Revenge
tecrod s revenge.desc: Supports Skills that create Persistent Minions, causing those Minions to fight on when they are fatally wounded, dying after a duration. Minions from Supported Skills gain Soul Eater and a burst of speed on entering this state.

skeletal storm mage.name: Skeletal Storm Mage
skeletal storm mage.desc: Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Storm Mages that can call down a lightning strike on dead Skeletons on Command.

overcharge.name: Overcharge
overcharge.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making its Shocks more effective but reflecting them back to you as well.

kurgal s leash.name: Kurgal's Leash
kurgal s leash.desc: Supports Commandable Minions causing you and the Supported Minion to gain Unholy Might when you Command them.

spectre powered zealot.name: Spectre: Powered Zealot
spectre powered zealot.desc: Summon the spirit of the bound monster as a Reviving Minion.

wildshards ii.name: Wildshards II
wildshards ii.desc: Supports Projectile Spells. Supported Spells have a chance to fire many additional Projectiles in a circle.

cursed ground.name: Cursed Ground
cursed ground.desc: Supports Curse Skills. Supported Curse Skills create areas which Curse Enemies so long as they are within them.

skeletal arsonist.name: Skeletal Arsonist
skeletal arsonist.desc: Activate to summon bomb-throwing, Reviving Skeletal Arsonists that can detonate other Minions on Command.

explosive spear.name: Explosive Spear
explosive spear.desc: Hurl a single payload Spear that pierces through enemies and lodges in terrain where it lands. The Spear will explode at the end of its Detonation Time or if Detonated. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if you have one to explode immediately, dealing more damage in a cross-shaped area and creating Ignited Ground.

storm lance.name: Storm Lance
storm lance.desc: Throw an electrified Spear that lodges in the ground and periodically zaps nearby enemies with Lightning bolts. If the Spear is Detonated by another Skill, it immediately unleashes a volley of bolts and expires. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if possible to fire bolts more frequently for a shorter duration, automatically Detonate at the end of its duration, and create Shocked Ground on Detonation.

seraph s heart.name: Seraph's Heart
seraph s heart.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, providing a chance for enemies to calculate their Hits as though your Resistances were 90% while the skill is active.

compressed duration ii.name: Compressed Duration II
compressed duration ii.desc: Supports any skill that has a duration making that duration shorter.

lightning warp.name: Lightning Warp
lightning warp.desc: Target an enemy to either teleport inside the target's body if they are under the Cull threshold, causing it to violently explode, or to apply a Debuff to them, which will cause the same effect if that enemy falls under the Cull threshold during its duration. Can also be used on Ball Lightning Projectiles. On teleport, the target is destroyed, and the explosion deals Lightning damage to surrounding enemies. If targeting an enemy, the explosion also creates Shocked Ground. Creates a Lightning Infusion on successful use. Highlights enemies that can be Culled.

demon form.name: Demon Form
demon form.desc: Shapeshift into a demon, vastly boosting the power of your Spells. You gain Demonflame every second you remain in demon form, causing your Life to be lost at an ever-increasing rate. Maximum 10 Demonflame. Revert to human form if you reach 1 Life, use a Skill that isn't a Spell, or reactivate this Skill.

focused curse.name: Focused Curse
focused curse.desc: Supports Curse skills, causing them to Curse enemies more quickly after being cast.

detonate living.name: Detonate Living
detonate living.desc: Hit an enemy under the Culling Strike Threshold, causing them to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies. Highlights enemies under the Culling Strike Threshold.

chaos bolt.name: Chaos Bolt
chaos bolt.desc: Fire a burst of Chaos energy at the target.

detonate dead.name: Detonate Dead
detonate dead.desc: Cause a Corpse to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies.

skyfall.name: Skyfall
skyfall.desc: Build Glory by spending Runic Ward. When you have maximum Glory, you may call down a mass of Verisium from the sky, dealing high damage at the targeted location and summoning a Temporary Minion. Targeting close to you will cause you to jump back as you cast. Consumes a Verisium Infusion, if possible, to increase the number of Minions summoned .

the stars answer.name: The Stars Answer
the stars answer.desc: Leash the stars themselves by leveraging your vast magical power, repeatedly Triggering Starfall targeting an enemy in an area around you, or a random location in that area if no enemies can be targeted.

soul offering.name: Soul Offering
soul offering.desc: Skewer a Skeleton on a bone spike, granting you a powerful Spell damage Buff as long as the spike remains. Does not affect your Minions. The bone spike is itself a Minion. If it dies, the effect ends immediately.

coiling bolts.name: Coiling Bolts
coiling bolts.desc: Simultaneously fires a Physical Projectile and a Chaos Projectile at the target. These projectiles Chain through any number of Cursed targets.

despair.name: Despair
despair.desc: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their Chaos Resistance.

withering touch.name: Withering Touch
withering touch.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Wither enemies on Hit.

life remnants.name: Life Remnants
life remnants.desc: Drink the blood of your enemies to restore your Life. While active, enemies you kill have a chance to spawn a Life Remnant, and Hitting a target spawns a Life Remnant every few seconds. Picking up a Life Remnant grants you Life which can Overflow maximum Life.

vulnerability.name: Vulnerability
vulnerability.desc: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay. making Hits against them ignore a portion of their Armour.

remnants of kalguur.name: Remnants of Kalguur
remnants of kalguur.desc: While active, enemies you Stun or kill have a chance to generate a Runic Ward Remnant. These Remnants can Overflow your Runic Ward.

his scattering calamity.name: His Scattering Calamity
his scattering calamity.desc: Conjure a crackling Wellsprite that hovers above you. After a short duration, the Wellsprite launches at an enemy, dealing Lightning damage in an area on impact and prioritising the last enemy targeted. Recasting this spell resets the duration for all active Wellsprites.

swift affliction iii.name: Swift Affliction III
swift affliction iii.desc: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing effects with a duration of one second or less to deal more non-Ailment damage over time.

ixchel s torment.name: Ixchel's Torment
ixchel s torment.desc: Supports Skills which Trigger other Skills. Skills Triggered by Supported Skills have their Damage, Area of Effect, and Projectile Speed randomly raised or lowered when Triggered, as well as recovering a random amount of their cost when Triggered.

feast of flesh.name: Feast of Flesh
feast of flesh.desc: Consume Corpses near you to recover Life and Mana over a short time per Corpse Consumed.

astral projection.name: Astral Projection
astral projection.desc: Supports Nova Skills, causing those Skills to take place at the targeted location when used instead of around you.

tame beast.name: Tame Beast
tame beast.desc: Conjure Azmeri wisps to engulf a Rare Beast for a duration, Hindering them. If you defeat the Beast while it is engulfed in wisps, it will be captured by this gem, transforming the gem to instead allow you to summon the Beast as a Reviving Companion.

voltaic mark.name: Voltaic Mark
voltaic mark.desc: Mark a target, making them more susceptible to being Electrocuted. When the Marked target is Electrocuted, the Mark Activates, granting a Buff which gives extra Lightning damage and Consuming the Mark. Marking another target while you have the Buff will remove the Buff.

flameblast.name: Flameblast
flameblast.desc: Channel to build destructive energy around you. Releasing the energy causes a devastating explosion that is larger and more intense the longer you Channelled for.

ignite ii.name: Ignite II
ignite ii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Ignite.

commiserate.name: Commiserate
commiserate.desc: Supports Skills you use or Trigger yourself, which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills inflict more powerful Ailments if you are afflicted with those Ailments when you inflict them, while also removing from you any Ailment that they inflict.

bleed iii.name: Bleed III
bleed iii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Bleeding.

deep cuts ii.name: Deep Cuts II
deep cuts ii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal less damage but inflict more potent Bleeding.

concoct ii.name: Concoct II
concoct ii.desc: Supports Skills you use yourself which Damage enemies with Hits. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Life Flask charges, inflicting more powerful Bleeding based on Life Flask charges consumed.

frostfire.name: Frostfire
frostfire.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to Consume Freeze on Igniting a Frozen enemy to boost the effect of the Ignite. Cannot support skills that Consume Freeze or Ignite.

searing flame ii.name: Searing Flame II
searing flame ii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing inflicted Ignites to deal more damage but its Hits to deal less damage.

dark effigy.name: Dark Effigy
dark effigy.desc: Raise a Totem that bombards enemies afflicted by Chaos damage over time Debuffs.

poison iii.name: Poison III
poison iii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Poison enemies and causing it to inflict more powerful Poisons against Bleeding Enemies.

gambleshot.name: Gambleshot
gambleshot.desc: Supports Skills which fire Projectiles that are not ground targeted. Projectiles from Supported Skills randomly Fork, Chain or Pierce.

essence drain.name: Essence Drain
essence drain.desc: Fire a Projectile that applies a powerful Chaos damage over time debuff to enemies it hits.

xoph s pyre.name: Xoph's Pyre
xoph s pyre.desc: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Ignites.

kalisa s crescendo.name: Kalisa's Crescendo
kalisa s crescendo.desc: Supports Curse Skills. Enemies Cursed by Supported Skills are Pacified for the final portion of the Supported Curse's duration.

decaying hex.name: Decaying Hex
decaying hex.desc: Supports Curse skills. Supported skill Trigger Profane Decay on each target they curse to inflict a damaging Debuff.

chaotic freeze.name: Chaotic Freeze
chaotic freeze.desc: Supports Spells that deal non-Ailment Chaos damage over time. Enemies taking damage over time from Debuffs caused by supported skills will suffer Freeze build up from Chaos damage Hits from any source. Does not Support Skills used by Minions.

purity of ice.name: Purity of Ice
purity of ice.desc: Emit an Aura that boosts the Cold Resistance of you and Allies in your Presence.

corpse conservation.name: Corpse Conservation
corpse conservation.desc: Supports skills that consume Corpses, giving them a chance to take effect without destroying the Corpse.

fulmination.name: Fulmination
fulmination.desc: While active, the first time any Skill Hits a Shocked enemy in your Presence, that Skill also Hits other Shocked enemies in your Presence, up to a maximum.

arbiter s reach.name: Arbiter's Reach
arbiter s reach.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you periodically grant Guard to allies in your Presence while the Skill is active.

reap.name: Reap
reap.desc: Conjure a bloody scythe that sweeps across the targeted area, dealing Physical damage to enemies and applying Critical Weakness. Cannot be Triggered.

bonestorm.name: Bonestorm
bonestorm.desc: Channel to conjure a swarm of bone spikes in the air, then release to fire them at enemies and explode. Shrapnel Impales enemies Hit, causing subsequent Attack Hits against those targets to deal extra damage. Consumes your Power Charges to cause much larger explosions.

burgeon ii.name: Burgeon II
burgeon ii.desc: Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself, causing them to deal more damage the longer they have been Channelled.

thrashing vines.name: Thrashing Vines
thrashing vines.desc: Spur the growth of huge vines, which emerge randomly within the target area. The vines crash to the ground then retreat, targeting nearby enemies if possible.

mysticism i.name: Mysticism I
mysticism i.desc: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Spell Damage while on full Energy Shield while the Supported Skill is active.

thunderstorm.name: Thunderstorm
thunderstorm.desc: Conjure a thunderstorm which causes lightning strikes and torrential rain in an area. Enemies in the area are Drenched, causing them to become Shocked or Frozen more easily. Plants in the area become Overgrown.

accelerated growth ii.name: Accelerated Growth II
accelerated growth ii.desc: Supports Plant Skills, causing them to Trigger an explosion after they have been Overgrown, Blinding enemies Hit.

trickster s shard.name: Trickster's Shard
trickster s shard.desc: Supports non-instant Spells you cast yourself. Supported Spells will Trigger Fragment Self, creating a Fractured Mimic which will cast that Spell if you get enough of them.

swift affliction ii.name: Swift Affliction II
swift affliction ii.desc: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing it to deal more non-Ailment damage over time but have a shorter duration.

thunderous leap.name: Thunderous Leap
thunderous leap.desc: Leap into the air and plunge your Spear into the ground at the target location, emitting a Lightning-charged shockwave.

retreat ii.name: Retreat II
retreat ii.desc: Supports Skills which create Projectiles. Supported Skills deal more damage with Projectiles if you have struck with a Melee Hit in the last eight seconds, but cannot themselves deal Melee Damage.

spell echo.name: Spell Echo
spell echo.desc: Supports Cascadable Spells you use yourself. Supported Spells Echo.

overabundance i.name: Overabundance I
overabundance i.desc: Supports Skills which have a Limit, increasing that Limit at the cost of their duration. Only applies to restrictions that use the word "Limit".

elemental storm.name: Elemental Storm
elemental storm.desc: Create a stationary Fire, Cold or Lightning storm at a target location for a duration, based on the highest Elemental Damage type for the Hit that Triggered the storm. Hits which do not deal Elemental Damage will not Trigger the storm.

ice nova.name: Ice Nova
ice nova.desc: Conjure a wave of ice in all directions, Knocking Back enemies based on how close they are to you. Casting Ice Nova targeting near a Frostbolt Projectile will cause it to originate from the Frostbolt instead of you. Consumes a Cold Infusion if possible to leave a patch of Chilled Ground.

controlled destruction.name: Controlled Destruction
controlled destruction.desc: Supports Spells that Hit enemies, boosting their damage but preventing them from dealing Critical Hits.

morgana s tempest.name: Morgana's Tempest
morgana s tempest.desc: Supports Storm skills, increasing their Limit and causing them to move quickly from the user to the target location, but become less effective. Cannot Support Triggered Skills.

kelari the tainted sands.name: Kelari, the Tainted Sands
kelari the tainted sands.desc: Summon Kelari, an invulnerable Sand Djinn Minion, to do your bidding. Kelari will only act when you Command him to do so. Kelari delivers swift Hits with massive Critical Hit potential.

bidding ii.name: Bidding II
bidding ii.desc: Supports Minion Skills. Supported Minions deal more damage and have increased Cooldown Recovery Rate with Command Skills.

mana tempest.name: Mana Tempest
mana tempest.desc: Create a storm of arcane energies that Empowers your Mana-costing Spells while you remain inside it. Maintaining the storm constantly drains your Mana, and spending more causes it to drain faster. The storm will dissipate when you exit it or run out of Mana.

time freeze.name: Time Freeze
time freeze.desc: Release a large wave that stops time for all affected enemies for a duration. Duration is lower the more times the enemy has had time stopped for them.

time snap.name: Time Snap
time snap.desc: Manipulate time, resetting the cooldowns of your other Skills.

cooldown recovery i.name: Cooldown Recovery I
cooldown recovery i.desc: Supports skills with Cooldowns, increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

cast on dodge.name: Cast on Dodge
cast on dodge.desc: While active, gains Energy when you dodge roll and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.

freezing shards.name: Freezing Shards
freezing shards.desc: Launch icy Projectiles in a sweeping arc. Multiple Projectiles can hit the same enemy.

frostbolt.name: Frostbolt
frostbolt.desc: Fire a slow-moving Piercing Projectile that is effective at Chilling enemies and explodes on colliding with terrain.

rising tempest.name: Rising Tempest
rising tempest.desc: Supports Skills which deal Damage, raising Elemental Damage dealt for each Skill used Recently of a different Elemental type. Cannot support Minion Skills.

temporal rift.name: Temporal Rift
temporal rift.desc: While active, passively leaves afterimages of your recent past. Cast the Spell to return to the oldest afterimage, teleporting to that location and resetting your Life, Mana and Energy Shield to the values they had at the time. Removes any upcoming damage delayed by Phased Form on use.

inevitable agony.name: Inevitable Agony
inevitable agony.desc: Debuff all targets in an area, causing a portion of Damage they take from Hits to be tracked by the Debuff. When the debuff's duration expires or can kill the target, the target loses life equal to that tracked damage all at once.

ruzhan the blazing sword.name: Ruzhan, the Blazing Sword
ruzhan the blazing sword.desc: Summon Ruzhan, an invulnerable Flame Djinn Minion, to do your bidding. Ruzhan emerges to Strike enemies with his greatsword whenever you use a damaging Skill, and casts devastating Fire Spells when Commanded to do so.

bidding iii.name: Bidding III
bidding iii.desc: Supports Minion Skills. Supported Minions have significantly increased Cooldown Recovery Rate with Command Skills.

navira the last mirage.name: Navira, the Last Mirage
navira the last mirage.desc: Summon Navira, an invulnerable Water Djinn Minion to do your bidding. Navira will only act when you Command her to do so, bestowing restorative blessings upon you and your Allies with her Spells.

encroaching ground.name: Encroaching Ground
encroaching ground.desc: Supports Skills that create Ground Surfaces, causing those Surfaces to grow over time, up to a limit.

frost nexus.name: Frost Nexus
frost nexus.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to create patches of Chilled Ground around Frozen enemies.

cast on minion death.name: Cast on Minion Death
cast on minion death.desc: While active, gains Energy when one of your Persistent Minions is Killed, and triggers socketed Spells upon reaching maximum Energy. Very underlevelled Minions will incur an Energy generation penalty. Cannot socket Spells which create Minions.

sacrificial lamb ii.name: Sacrificial Lamb II
sacrificial lamb ii.desc: Supports Skills which create Minions, causing your Skills which can target Minions to prioritise targeting Minions from the Supported Skill before your other Minions where possible, as well as causing them to always be considered Detonatable.

multishot i.name: Multishot I
multishot i.desc: Supports Projectile skills, making them fire extra Projectiles. Also lowers Attack and Cast speed of supported skills, as well as lessening their damage.

skeletal brute.name: Skeletal Brute
skeletal brute.desc: Activate to summon hard-hitting, Reviving Skeletal Brutes that can Stun Primed enemies and Warcry on Command. This Warcry Intimidates nearby enemies and Consumes Freeze on enemies and allies to deal damage in an Area around them.

rearm ii.name: Rearm II
rearm ii.desc: Supports Skills which create Hazards. Hazards created by Supported Skills have a chance to be rearmed a short duration after triggering.

electromagnetism.name: Electromagnetism
electromagnetism.desc: Supports Skills that Hit enemies. When Supported Skills Shock an enemy that is nearby other Shocked enemies, trigger Electromagnetism, sucking in nearby enemies, Hindering them, and dealing Lightning damage at an interval.

elemental armament iii.name: Elemental Armament III
elemental armament iii.desc: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more Damage for each Elemental Ailment on Enemies they Hit. Supported Skills cannot themselves inflict Elemental Ailments.

galvanic shards.name: Galvanic Shards
galvanic shards.desc: Load your Crossbow with charged bolts that fragment in flight, releasing Chaining Lightning beams when they Hit enemies. These fragments can Merge.

dominus grasp.name: Dominus' Grasp
dominus grasp.desc: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain more times.

stormblast bolts.name: Stormblast Bolts
stormblast bolts.desc: Load your Crossbow with charged bolts that land around the target location and explode if hit by a Detonator Skill. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.

defiance banner.name: Defiance Banner
defiance banner.desc: While active, Attacking enemies builds Glory. When you have maximum Glory, you can place an inspiring Banner for a duration with an Aura that grants you and nearby Allies Armour, Evasion and movement speed.

dread banner.name: Dread Banner
dread banner.desc: While active, Attacking enemies builds Glory. When you have maximum Glory, you can place an inspiring Banner for a duration with an Aura that grants you and nearby Allies Elemental Ailment Threshold, Maximum Elemental Resistances and Flask charges.

molten crash.name: Molten Crash
molten crash.desc: Shapeshift into a burning monstrosity and leap through the air to crash down upon the earth, Slamming twice and creating Molten Fissures. Consumes Rage to create additional Molten Fissures.

cast on block.name: Cast on Block
cast on block.desc: While active, gains Energy when you Block and triggers socketed Spells on reaching maximum Energy.

thrill of the kill.name: Thrill of the Kill
thrill of the kill.desc: Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Culling a Shocked enemy with Supported Skills infuses all of your Attacks with Lightning damage for a short time.

sorcery ward.name: Sorcery Ward
sorcery ward.desc: Passively manifests a protective barrier which takes Elemental Damage from Hits for you until depleted. The barrier instantly recharges to its full value a short time after it stops taking damage or is fully depleted.

expanse.name: Expanse
expanse.desc: Supports any Skill that you use yourself, granting it significantly higher Area of Effect but causing it to gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.

flash grenade.name: Flash Grenade
flash grenade.desc: Fire a bouncing Grenade that unleashes a Blinding, Stunning explosion when its fuse expires.

defy ii.name: Defy II
defy ii.desc: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Hit Damage from Supported Skills is Lucky and Insufficient Mana doesn't prevent Supported Skills from being used if you are Surrounded.

inexorable critical ii.name: Inexorable Critical II
inexorable critical ii.desc: Supports any skill you use yourself that Hits enemies, causing it to accumulate Critical Hit chance over time, but also reduce your Critical Damage Bonus.

arjun s medal.name: Arjun's Medal
arjun s medal.desc: Supports Crossbow Skills, causing them to load a bolt into all Crossbow Ammunition on kill.

neural overload.name: Neural Overload
neural overload.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies. Nearby enemies are marked when they are Primed for Electrocution, and hitting a marked enemy with a supported skill will Electrocute them.

emergency reload.name: Emergency Reload
emergency reload.desc: Instantly reload all your Crossbow Ammunition clips and Empower each clip's Ammunition to deal more damage for a duration.

requiem.name: Requiem
requiem.desc: Your weapon passively accumulates anguish from the tormented souls within. When fully charged, use this skill to compose the Requiem, transforming your Crossbow shot into a torrent of anguish for a short, fixed amount of time. Does not use Ammunition.

fluke.name: Fluke
fluke.desc: Supports Skills which Trigger other Skills. Skills Triggered by Supported Skills have their Damage randomly raised or lowered when Triggered, as well as recovering a random amount of their cost when Triggered.

living lightning.name: Living Lightning
living lightning.desc: Supports Skills which cause Damaging Hits. Living Lightning Minions are created when dealing Lightning damage with Supported Skills - bundles of living electricity that target nearby enemies with Chaining Attacks. Enemies will not directly engage these Minions, and can pass through them. Does not modify skills used by Minions.

crushing fear.name: Crushing Fear
crushing fear.desc: Dash to an enemy and Strike them, Culling enemies if their life is low enough. When this skill kills an enemy you draw out their final fears, crushing them to create a shockwave. Enemies around you that can be Culled will be highlighted.

poison i.name: Poison I
poison i.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Poison enemies.

rage ii.name: Rage II
rage ii.desc: Supports Melee Attacks, causing them to grant Rage on Hit.

punch through.name: Punch Through
punch through.desc: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills apply Easy Target when Knocking Back Enemies, causing the next Projectile Attack Hit they take to deal increased Damage.

lightning spear.name: Lightning Spear
lightning spear.desc: Throw a single copy of your spear. When it hits an enemy it bursts, firing secondary lightning bolt Projectiles at multiple other enemies within a large area around it. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if possible to cause the main spear to split into multiple copies on impact, each of which then bursts.

armour demolisher i.name: Armour Demolisher I
armour demolisher i.desc: Supports any skill, causing Armour Break it inflicts to be stronger.

virtuous barrier.name: Virtuous Barrier
virtuous barrier.desc: While active, conjures a glittering barrier that accumulates protective gemstone Motes of each Attribute type over time, but loses a random Mote when you are Hit.

second wind i.name: Second Wind I
second wind i.desc: Supports Skills which have a cooldown, giving them extra uses of that cooldown. Cannot support Meta, instant, or Triggered Skills, and cannot modify the Skills of Minions.

heightened accuracy i.name: Heightened Accuracy I
heightened accuracy i.desc: Supports Attacks, causing them to gain Accuracy.

deadly poison ii.name: Deadly Poison II
deadly poison ii.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal less damage but inflict more potent Poison.

hammer of the gods.name: Hammer of the Gods
hammer of the gods.desc: Build Glory by Heavy Stunning enemies. When you have maximum Glory you may entreat the Ancestors to crush your enemies, manifesting a massive hammer that falls from the sky onto your target, Slamming into the ground after a short duration and dealing immense damage based on your weapon.

deep freeze.name: Deep Freeze
deep freeze.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing Freeze it inflicts to last longer.

cross slash.name: Cross Slash
cross slash.desc: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and leap backwards as you gouge the ground with both claws. Enemies can be Hit separately by both gouges. Hitting a Marked enemy with both gouges will Activate the Mark and cause an additional shockwave. Ice Fragments will be pulled into the location where the gouges cross and explode immediately. This skill can be used while using other skills to interrupt them.

contagion.name: Contagion
contagion.desc: Afflict a single enemy with a Debuff that deals Chaos damage over time. If the enemy dies while affected by Contagion, it spreads itself, Curses, and other Chaos damage over time Debuffs on the target to nearby enemies. This refreshes their durations. Reanimating or detonating a corpse affected by Contagion will cause the Minion or explosion to spread Contagion on hit.

brutality i.name: Brutality I
brutality i.desc: Supports any skill that deals damage, boosting its Physical damage at the expense of all other Damage Types.

glacial lance.name: Glacial Lance
glacial lance.desc: Throw a single Piercing lance that leaves icy fragments in its wake. The fragments Chill nearby enemies. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if possible to cause the glacial fragments created by the first Projectile to explode outwards after a short duration, peppering enemies with shrapnel.

lingering illusion.name: Lingering Illusion
lingering illusion.desc: While active, creates a short-lived illusory copy of yourself whenever you dodge roll. The copy can be damaged by enemies, and copies that are destroyed by an enemy will drop a Remnant that grants you a Power Charge on pickup.

corrosion.name: Corrosion
corrosion.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing Poison it applies to also Break enemy Armour. Cannot support skills that Consume Fully Broken Armour.

chain i.name: Chain I
chain i.desc: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain additional times.

snap.name: Snap
snap.desc: Consume the elemental energy from a Frozen, Shocked or Ignited enemy, creating an elemental blast that leaves behind an Infusion Remnant. The blast will spread to other enemies affected by the same Ailment, but those blasts cannot spread further. Can also be cast on a Frostbolt to create a larger cold blast.

ember fusillade.name: Ember Fusillade
ember fusillade.desc: Conjure a blazing Ember that hovers above you. After a short duration, the Ember launches at an enemy, dealing Fire damage in an area on impact and prioritising the last enemy targeted. Recasting this spell resets the duration for all active Embers. Multiple Embers fired in the same Fusillade will attempt to target different enemies. Consumes a Lightning Infusion if possible to cause the entire Fusillade to create beams that Chain to enemies.

eye of winter.name: Eye of Winter
eye of winter.desc: Fire a single Eye Projectile which does not Hit enemies. The Eye constantly releases damaging shard Projectiles in a spiral as it flies. If the Eye passes over an Elemental Ground Surface or Orb, it will take on that surface's effect causing shards to deal more damage of the corresponding Type.

acrimony.name: Acrimony
acrimony.desc: Supports Skills which can Damage Enemies. Enemies affected by Damage over time from Supported Skills which was not caused by a Damaging Ailment have reduced Life regeneration rate. Only the strongest instance of this Debuff will apply. Does not Support Skills used by Minions.

immolate.name: Immolate
immolate.desc: Supports Attacks, granting them extra Fire damage against Ignited enemies but making them unable to Ignite enemies themselves.

m rrigan s insight.name: Mórrigan's Insight
m rrigan s insight.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to deal more damage and trigger Nature's Exchange when consuming Freeze on enemies. Cannot support skills that Consume Freeze.

rite of restoration.name: Rite of Restoration
rite of restoration.desc: Place a Sigil on the ground, providing a powerful Buff to you and Allies standing in it which grants Life Regeneration and amplifies Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield. The Buff becomes more powerful the more mana you spend while standing in the Sigil.

firebolt.name: Firebolt
firebolt.desc: Launch a fiery Projectile towards a target. The Projectile explodes on impact, damaging foes in a small area.

urgent totems i.name: Urgent Totems I
urgent totems i.desc: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Skills to place Totems much more quickly.

nimble reload.name: Nimble Reload
nimble reload.desc: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to Reload bolts significantly faster.

elemental surge.name: Elemental Surge
elemental surge.desc: Grants your weapon Surges. Non-Melee Projectile Attacks with that weapon Consume Surges to cause the Projectiles fired to explode at the end of their flight.

bounty ii.name: Bounty II
bounty ii.desc: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more Flask and Charm charges.

pursuit ii.name: Pursuit II
pursuit ii.desc: Supports Melee Attacks. Supported Skills deal more Melee damage if you have struck with a Projectile Attack Hit in the last eight seconds, but cannot themselves deal Projectile Damage.

minion pact ii.name: Minion Pact II
minion pact ii.desc: Supports damaging skills you use yourself, draining the life from one of your Minions on use in order to boost the skill's damage. Only takes effect if you have a Minion with enough life to drain the full amount.

vivid stampede.name: Vivid Stampede
vivid stampede.desc: Call upon Spirits of the Stag, sending them leaping forward. Each Stag releases a damaging shockwave each time it lands, and any Stags that travel the maximum possible distance also leave behind Shocked Ground.

wild protector.name: Wild Protector
wild protector.desc: Call upon a Bear Spirit Companion to maul your foes. The Bear Spirit leaps at enemies to Maim them, Leeches Life with its slam, and periodically roars to Intimidate enemies. The Bear Spirit does not count toward your Companion limit.

removed skill.name: Removed Skill
removed skill.desc: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

primal bounty.name: Primal Bounty
primal bounty.desc: Empowers the next Projectile Skill you use, causing it to create additional Projectiles and fly faster.

primal strikes.name: Primal Strikes
primal strikes.desc: Perform a Lightning-charged stab that can be chained into a combination of up to three attacks. The first two attacks conjure a charging Wildwood spirit if they Hit a Shocked enemy and refresh Shock duration. The third attack is a large swipe that inflicts Elemental Exposure, and can Consume Shock to conjure a stampede of spirits.

pursuit iii.name: Pursuit III
pursuit iii.desc: Supports Melee Attacks. Supported Skills deal more Melee damage if you have struck with a Projectile Attack Hit in the last two seconds, but cannot themselves deal Projectile Damage.

companion diretusk boar.name: Companion: Diretusk Boar
companion diretusk boar.desc: Summon a Reviving Beast Companion to aid you in combat.

hand of chayula.name: Hand of Chayula
hand of chayula.desc: Dash to an enemy and Strike them, triggering socketed Marks with increased effect and applying socketed Curses with increased duration.

stormfire.name: Stormfire
stormfire.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies. Enemies Shocked by Supported Skills take a percentage of damage from Ignite as Lightning damage as well as Fire damage.

bursting plague.name: Bursting Plague
bursting plague.desc: Supports skills that can Poison enemies, causing Poisoned enemies to gain Plague over time and explode in a Plague Burst on death. Cannot support the skills of Minions.

toxic growth.name: Toxic Growth
toxic growth.desc: Fire a rain of Toxic Pustules into the air. The Pustules deal damage on impact, then Detonate after a delay. They can also be Poisoned, causing them to Detonate faster and more violently.

arakaali s lust.name: Arakaali's Lust
arakaali s lust.desc: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to deal increasingly higher damage the more Poisons are on the target.

clash.name: Clash
clash.desc: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills deal more Damage while you have a lower percentage of your Life remaining than the target struck, but less Damage when the reverse is true.

poisonburst arrow.name: Poisonburst Arrow
poisonburst arrow.desc: Fire a virulent arrow that creates a burst of Poison on hit, affecting all enemies in an area.

tacati s ire.name: Tacati's Ire
tacati s ire.desc: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Poison inflicted with Supported Skills deals Damage faster the higher your Rage.

gas arrow.name: Gas Arrow
gas arrow.desc: Fire a noxious arrow at the ground, creating a cloud of flammable poisonous gas at the end of its flight. The cloud will detonate if hit by a Detonator skill or if an Ignited enemy touches it, creating a fiery explosion.

persistent ground iii.name: Persistent Ground III
persistent ground iii.desc: Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing created Surfaces to last much longer as well as lowering the Cooldown Recovery Speed of affected Enemies. Ground Surfaces from Supported Skills only end when their duration expires.

escalating poison.name: Escalating Poison
escalating poison.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing it to inflict an extra Poison on enemies but shortening the duration of those Poisons.

vine arrow.name: Vine Arrow
vine arrow.desc: Fire an arrow into the air that lands after a short delay, damaging enemies and causing a plant to spring up at the impact location. The plant sprouts vines that latch onto nearby enemies, Slowing their movement speed and dealing Chaos damage over time. The plant can be Poisoned, causing it to deal more damage.

herald of plague.name: Herald of Plague
herald of plague.desc: While active, killing a Poisoned enemy spreads its Poison to other nearby enemies, and has a chance to also Hinder them.

companion antlion charger.name: Companion: Antlion Charger
companion antlion charger.desc: Summon a Reviving Beast Companion to aid you in combat.

remnant potency ii.name: Remnant Potency II
remnant potency ii.desc: Supports Skills which create Remnants, making those Remnants more powerful, but delaying their effect.

raise zombie.name: Raise Zombie
raise zombie.desc: Consume a Corpse or Power Charge to create a short-lived Zombie. Zombies created from Power Charges are Empowered and also create two additional non-empowered Zombies.

crazed minions.name: Crazed Minions
crazed minions.desc: Supports Minion Skills which summon Reviving Minions. Supported Minions deal significantly more Damage if they have Revived Recently.

disengage.name: Disengage
disengage.desc: Jump back as you rupture the earth in front of you with spearpoints, damaging enemies. Consumes the Parried Debuff on Hitting enemies to release a shockwave and grant you a Frenzy Charge. This skill can be used while using other skills, and causes Strikes and Projectiles to miss you while jumping. This skill cannot be Ancestrally Boosted.

concussive spells.name: Concussive Spells
concussive spells.desc: Supports Spells which Hit enemies. Supported Skills Daze on Critically Hitting enemies with Physical damage.

lightning bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
lightning bolt.desc: Call down a Shocking bolt of Lightning to strike enemies in a small area.

mana flare.name: Mana Flare
mana flare.desc: Supports any Spell that Hits enemies, causing it to trigger a Mana Flare on Critical Hit. The Mana Flare consumes your Mana to deal Fire damage. Cannot support the skills of Minions.

fiery death.name: Fiery Death
fiery death.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing enemies it Ignites to have a chance to explode on death.

upheaval i.name: Upheaval I
upheaval i.desc: Supports Skills which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create an additional fissure at the cost of damage and speed.

furious slam.name: Furious Slam
furious slam.desc: Shapeshift into a Bear and Slam the ground with great force, causing a pair of shockwaves. Can spend Rage to create larger shockwaves that leave behind Jagged Ground.

hourglass.name: Hourglass
hourglass.desc: Supports any damaging skill that you use yourself, causing it to deal significantly more damage but gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.

advancing storm.name: Advancing Storm
advancing storm.desc: Supports Storm skills, causing them to appear at the user's location and move towards the target location.

cold exposure.name: Cold Exposure
cold exposure.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Exposure when it Critically Hits an enemy.

execrate.name: Execrate
execrate.desc: Supports any damaging Skill that you use yourself, granting it significantly higher chance to inflict Ailments on hit, but causing it to gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.

ricochet i.name: Ricochet I
ricochet i.desc: Supports any Skill which creates Projectiles, giving those Projectiles a chance to Chain when impacting terrain.

nova projectiles ii.name: Nova Projectiles II
nova projectiles ii.desc: Supports Projectile Skills, making them fire extra Projectiles in a circle, at the cost of Damage and gaining a cooldown. Does not Support Skills which rain down Projectiles from above. Cannot Support Skills which already have a cooldown.

unearth.name: Unearth
unearth.desc: Raise spikes of bone from the earth in front of you, damaging enemies. The bones of Corpses and dead Reviving Minions in the area are ripped out and reassembled into short-lived Bone Construct Minions that fight for you. Larger Corpses create more than one Bone Construct.

harmonic remnants i.name: Harmonic Remnants I
harmonic remnants i.desc: Supports Skills which create Remnants, allowing those Remnants to be collected from further away.

rapid casting i.name: Rapid Casting I
rapid casting i.desc: Supports Spells, causing them to cast faster.

stomping ground.name: Stomping Ground
stomping ground.desc: Supports Travel skills, causing your footsteps to crack the earth and emit damaging shockwaves while using the skill.

apocalypse.name: Apocalypse
apocalypse.desc: Build Glory by Hitting enemies with Elemental damage. When you have maximum Glory, you may become the walking Apocalypse for a duration, Triggering one of multiple powerful Elemental Skills at an interval while this Buff lasts.

parry.name: Parry
parry.desc: Ready your Buckler to parry the next Hit you would take, Blocking the Hit and retaliating with a quick sweep that leaves enemies off balance, causing them to take massively increased Attack damage for a short duration. Parrying causes you to accumulate Heavy Stun buildup. You cannot Evade a Hit you could parry, but Evasion instead grants an equal chance to avoid this Heavy Stun buildup.

fortress i.name: Fortress I
fortress i.desc: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to be created in a circle instead but deal less Hit damage.

life drain.name: Life Drain
life drain.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing you to recover Life when it Culls an enemy.

steadfast i.name: Steadfast I
steadfast i.desc: Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself, granting you higher Stun Threshold while Channelling them.

minion pact i.name: Minion Pact I
minion pact i.desc: Supports damaging skills you use yourself, draining the life from one of your Minions on use in order to boost the skill's damage. Only takes effect if you have a Minion with enough life to drain the full amount.

hayoxi s fulmination.name: Hayoxi's Fulmination
hayoxi s fulmination.desc: Supports Curse Skills, giving them a short cooldown but causing them to create areas which Curse enemies so long as they are within them. Cursed areas from Supported Skills gather power before erupting in a column of annihilating light after a moderate delay.

grim feast.name: Grim Feast
grim feast.desc: While active, your Reviving Minions store a percentage of their maximum Life in a collectible Grim Remnant on death. Using Grim Resurrection Consumes the Life you've collected to Revive up to that much total Life of dead Minions.

zenith i.name: Zenith I
zenith i.desc: Supports Spell Skills. Supported Skills deal more damage while you are above 90% of your Maximum Mana. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

shockwave totem.name: Shockwave Totem
shockwave totem.desc: Raise a Totem that Slams the ground around it, repeatedly damaging nearby enemies. Jagged Ground erupts when hit by this Slam, damaging enemies standing on it. The Totem cannot create Jagged Ground. This Skill can be used while Shapeshifted.

reinforced totems ii.name: Reinforced Totems II
reinforced totems ii.desc: Supports Skills which create Totems. Totems created by Supported Skills have additional Elemental Resistances.

wildfire.name: Wildfire
wildfire.desc: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, Spreading Ignites it inflicts to nearby enemies after a delay.

ancestral cry.name: Ancestral Cry
ancestral cry.desc: Perform a Warcry using Glory gained by Igniting enemies to turn you into an embodiment of Kaom. While embodying Kaom, you Trigger Volcanic Steps while travelling, Melee Strikes and Slams are Ancestrally Boosted, and your Melee Strikes Trigger Volcanic Eruption.

stats: Gain Tailwind on Skill use
Lose all Tailwind when Hit

stats: 50% of Evasion Rating also grants Elemental Damage reduction
